To demonstrate the use of the dataset, we benchmark six state-of-the-art LALMs and additionally test their robustness to uni-modal shortcuts.

</details>


### [341] [Article and Comment Frames Shape the Quality of Online Comments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27889)
*Matteo Guida,Yulia Otmakhova,Eduard Hovy,Lea Frermann*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现新闻文章框架显著影响读者评论质量，采用文章框架的评论更健康，不健康评论会引发更多不健康回应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已有研究表明文章框架会影响读者回应的内容，但框架是否也影响回应质量尚不清楚。本研究旨在探索框架理论与话语质量之间的联系

Method: 分析100万条评论和2700篇新闻文章，将评论质量操作化为"评论健康度"（建设性、善意的贡献），控制主题因素，并开发了基于LLM的框架感知系统

Result: 文章框架显著预测评论健康度；采用文章框架的评论比偏离框架的评论更健康；不健康的顶级评论会引发更多不健康回应，与评论使用的框架无关

Conclusion: 建立了框架理论与话语质量之间的联系，为下游应用奠定基础，展示了基于LLM的框架感知系统在缓解不健康话语方面的潜力

Abstract: Framing theory posits that how information is presented shapes audience responses, but computational work has largely ignored audience reactions. While recent work showed that article framing systematically shapes the content of reader responses, this paper asks: Does framing also affect response quality? Analyzing 1M comments across 2.7K news articles, we operationalize quality as comment health (constructive, good-faith contributions). We find that article frames significantly predict comment health while controlling for topic, and that comments that adopt the article frame are healthier than those that depart from it. Further, unhealthy top-level comments tend to generate more unhealthy responses, independent of the frame being used in the comment. Our results establish a link between framing theory and discourse quality, laying the groundwork for downstream applications. We illustrate this potential with a proactive frame-aware LLM- based system to mitigate unhealthy discourse

</details>


### [342] [Top-down string-to-dependency Neural Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27938)
*Shuhei Kondo,Katsuhito Sudoh,Yuji Matsumoto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一种新颖的语法解码器，以自上而下、从左到右的顺序生成目标语言依存树，在翻译训练数据中未观察到的长输入时，比传统的序列到序列解码具有更好的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于注意力机制的编码器-解码器NMT模型在标准数据集上表现良好，但在翻译训练中罕见或未见的长输入时存在困难。融入目标语法是解决这类长度相关问题的一种方法。

Method: 提出一种新颖的语法解码器，以自上而下、从左到右的顺序生成目标语言依存树，而不是传统的序列生成方式。

Result: 实验表明，提出的自上而下的字符串到树解码方法在翻译训练数据中未观察到的长输入时，比传统的序列到序列解码具有更好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过融入目标语法并以树形结构生成翻译，可以有效改善NMT模型在处理长输入时的性能，特别是在处理训练数据中未见的长句子时表现更优。

Abstract: Most of modern neural machine translation (NMT) models are based on an encoder-decoder framework with an attention mechanism. While they perform well on standard datasets, they can have trouble in translation of long inputs that are rare or unseen during training. Incorporating target syntax is one approach to dealing with such length-related problems. We propose a novel syntactic decoder that generates a target-language dependency tree in a top-down, left-to-right order. Experiments show that the proposed top-down string-to-tree decoding generalizes better than conventional sequence-to-sequence decoding in translating long inputs that are not observed in the training data.

</details>


### [343] [EnsemJudge: Enhancing Reliability in Chinese LLM-Generated Text Detection through Diverse Model Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27949)
*Zhuoshang Wang,Yubing Ren,Guoyu Zhao,Xiaowei Zhu,Hao Li,Yanan Cao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出EmsemJudge框架，通过定制策略和集成投票机制检测中文LLM生成文本，在NLPCC2025共享任务中取得最佳性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成文本的滥用带来社会风险，现有检测方法主要针对英文，对中文文本检测研究有限，且实际场景中存在域外输入和对抗样本的挑战

Method: 提出EmsemJudge框架，结合定制策略和集成投票机制，在NLPCC2025共享任务提供的中文数据集上进行训练和评估

Result: 在NLPCC2025共享任务1中超越所有基线方法并取得第一名，证明了在中文LLM生成文本检测中的有效性和可靠性

Conclusion: EmsemJudge是一个鲁棒的中文LLM生成文本检测框架，通过集成方法有效应对实际场景中的挑战，代码已开源

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely applied across various domains due to their powerful text generation capabilities. While LLM-generated texts often resemble human-written ones, their misuse can lead to significant societal risks. Detecting such texts is an essential technique for mitigating LLM misuse, and many detection methods have shown promising results across different datasets. However, real-world scenarios often involve out-of-domain inputs or adversarial samples, which can affect the performance of detection methods to varying degrees. Furthermore, most existing research has focused on English texts, with limited work addressing Chinese text detection. In this study, we propose EnsemJudge, a robust framework for detecting Chinese LLM-generated text by incorporating tailored strategies and ensemble voting mechanisms. We trained and evaluated our system on a carefully constructed Chinese dataset provided by NLPCC2025 Shared Task 1. Our approach outperformed all baseline methods and achieved first place in the task, demonstrating its effectiveness and reliability in Chinese LLM-generated text detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/johnsonwangzs/MGT-Mini.

</details>


### [344] [On the Role of Encoder Depth: Pruning Whisper and LoRA Fine-Tuning in SLAM-ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27981)
*Ganesh Pavan Kartikeya Bharadwaj Kolluri,Michael Kampouridis,Ravi Shekhar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究分析了在SLAM-ASR系统中对Whisper编码器进行层剪枝的影响，并探索了LoRA微调如何恢复剪枝带来的性能损失。实验表明剪枝2层仅导致2-4%的WER退化，结合LoRA后甚至能超越未剪枝基线，同时减少7-14%的参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然模型剪枝已在完整的Whisper编码器-解码器架构中得到探索，但在SLAM-ASR设置中，特别是针对Whisper编码器作为声学骨干时的剪枝影响尚未充分研究。本研究旨在填补这一空白，并探索LoRA微调能否恢复剪枝带来的性能损失。

Method: 研究在SLAM-ASR系统中对Whisper编码器进行层剪枝，并采用LoRA（低秩适应）进行微调。实验设计包括：三个Whisper变体（Small、Medium、Large-v2）、三种代表不同资源水平的语言（丹麦语、荷兰语、英语），以及超过200次训练运行。

Result: 剪枝两个编码器层仅导致2-4%的WER退化。结合LoRA适应后，系统在减少7-14%总参数的同时，性能持续优于未剪枝基线。对于荷兰语和英语，LoRA通过语言模型的语言先验减少了11-21%的总词错误，其中替换和删除错误减少最多。但对于低资源的丹麦语，减少幅度较小（4-7%），且LoRA引入了更多的插入错误。

Conclusion: Whisper编码器在SLAM-ASR系统中具有显著的冗余性，剪枝两个层对性能影响有限。LoRA微调能有效补偿剪枝损失，但其效果取决于语言模型已有的语言熟练度和可用训练数据。该方法为构建更高效的ASR系统提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has advanced rapidly in recent years, driven by large-scale pretrained models and end-to-end architectures such as SLAM-ASR. A key component of SLAM-ASR systems is the Whisper speech encoder, which provides robust acoustic representations. While model pruning has been explored for the full Whisper encoder-decoder architecture, its impact within the SLAM-ASR setting remains under-investigated. In this work, we analyze the effects of layer pruning in the Whisper encoder when used as the acoustic backbone of SLAM-ASR. We further examine the extent to which LoRA-based fine-tuning can recover performance degradation caused by pruning. Experiments conducted across three Whisper variants (Small, Medium, Large-v2), three languages representing distinct resource levels (Danish, Dutch, English), and over 200 training runs demonstrate that pruning two encoder layers causes only 2-4% WER degradation, and that combining this pruning with LoRA adaptation consistently outperforms the unpruned baseline while reducing total parameters by 7-14%. Moreover, our error analysis reveals that LoRA primarily compensates through the language model's linguistic priors, reducing total word errors by 11-21% for Dutch and English, with substitutions and deletions showing the largest reductions. However, for low-resource Danish, the reduction is smaller (4-7%), and LoRA introduces increased insertion errors, indicating that compensation effectiveness depends on the LLM's pre-existing language proficiency and available training data.

</details>


### [345] [Rethinking Atomic Decomposition for LLM Judges: A Prompt-Controlled Study of Reference-Grounded QA Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28005)
*Xinran Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究比较了原子分解式与整体式LLM评判器在参考支持分类任务上的表现，发现整体式评判器在多数情况下表现相当或更好，特别是在检测部分支持案例方面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原子分解（将候选答案分解为多个主张后逐一验证）是LLM参考评判器的常用设计，但尚不清楚其优势是来自分解本身还是更丰富的提示。本研究旨在澄清分解与提示丰富度对评判器性能的相对贡献。

Method: 在TruthfulQA、ASQA和QAMPARI三个数据集上，比较自分解原子评判器（单提示分解验证）与提示控制的整体评判器。使用四个模型家族，每个数据集200个源示例，进行源级配对测试、聚类引导和三个预冻结提示变体的聚合分析。

Result: 整体评判器在两个基准（ASQA和QAMPARI）上匹配或优于原子评判器（在四个模型家族中的三个具有统计可靠性），TruthfulQA显示原子评判器有微弱优势。整体优势集中在部分支持案例的检测上。参考质量下降对两种评判器都产生最大准确率下降。

Conclusion: 对于自分解单提示模式在三个QA风格基准上的参考支持分类任务，整体评判器通常表现相当或更好，特别是在检测不完整性方面。但结论限于特定实验设置，多阶段原子管道和非QA任务仍需测试。

Abstract: Atomic decomposition -- breaking a candidate answer into claims before verifying each against a reference -- is a widely adopted design for LLM-based reference-grounded judges. However, atomic prompts are typically richer and longer, making it unclear whether any advantage comes from decomposition or from richer prompting. We study this for benchmark-style completeness-sensitive reference-support classification: classifying a candidate as fully supported, partially supported, or unsupported relative to a supplied reference. We compare a self-decomposing atomic judge (single-prompt decompose-and-verify) against a prompt-controlled holistic judge with the same inputs and a similarly detailed rubric. On 200 source examples per dataset across TruthfulQA, ASQA, and QAMPARI, with four model families, source-level paired tests, cluster bootstrap, and aggregation across three pre-frozen prompt variants per design family, we find the holistic judge matches or exceeds the atomic judge on two of three benchmarks: ASQA and QAMPARI favor holistic across all four families (statistically reliable in three of four), while TruthfulQA shows a small atomic edge. The holistic advantage is concentrated in partially\_supported cases -- incompleteness detection. A sensitivity check against human annotations confirms the ranking under both benchmark-completeness and human factual-correctness standards. Our finding is specific to the self-decomposing single-prompt pattern on three QA-style benchmarks with 200 source examples each; multi-stage atomic pipelines and non-QA tasks remain untested. Among perturbations examined, reference-quality degradation produced the largest accuracy drops for both judge families.

</details>


### [346] [Transfer Learning for an Endangered Slavic Variety: Dependency Parsing in Pomak Across Contact-Shaped Dialects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28033)
*Sercan Karakaş*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究Pomak语言（濒危的东南斯拉夫语）的依存句法分析，比较希腊和土耳其方言间的跨方言迁移效果，并引入新的土耳其方言标注语料库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Pomak是一种濒危的东南斯拉夫语言，具有显著的方言变异且缺乏广泛采用的标准。现有Universal Dependencies树库主要基于希腊方言构建，需要研究其跨方言迁移效果，并为土耳其方言建立新的标注资源。

Method: 1. 在希腊方言UD数据上训练依存句法分析器，评估其对土耳其方言的零样本迁移效果，量化音系和形态句法差异的影响；2. 引入新的手动标注的土耳其方言语料库（650句），进行针对性微调，并探索结合两种方言的跨方言迁移学习。

Result: 1. 零样本迁移显示方言间存在显著差异；2. 尽管新语料库规模较小，针对性微调能显著提升准确率；3. 结合两种方言的跨方言迁移学习能进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: 对于濒危语言Pomak，即使小规模的方言特定标注数据也能显著改善依存句法分析性能，跨方言迁移学习是有效的策略，为处理方言变异的低资源语言提供了实用方法。

Abstract: This paper presents new resources and baselines for Dependency Parsing in Pomak, an endangered Eastern South Slavic language with substantial dialectal variation and no widely adopted standard. We focus on the variety spoken in Turkey (Uzunköprü) and ask how well a dependency parser trained on the existing Pomak Universal Dependencies treebank, which was built primarily from the variety that is spoken in Greece, transfers across dialects. We run two experimental phases. First, we train a parser on the Greek-variety UD data and evaluate zero-shot transfer to Turkish-variety Pomak, quantifying the impact of phonological and morphosyntactic differences. Second, we introduce a new manually annotated Turkish-variety Pomak corpus of 650 sentences and show that, despite its small size, targeted fine-tuning substantially improves accuracy; performance is further boosted by cross-variety transfer learning that combines the two dialects.

</details>


### [347] [Who Wrote the Book? Detecting and Attributing LLM Ghostwriters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28054)
*Anudeex Shetty,Qiongkai Xu,Olga Ohrimenko,Jey Han Lau*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GhostWriteBench是一个用于LLM作者归属的数据集，包含由前沿LLM生成长文本，并设计用于测试跨多个OOD维度的泛化能力。TRACE是一种新颖的可解释轻量级指纹方法，在GhostWriteBench上实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型生成文本的普及，需要有效的作者归属方法来识别文本来源。现有方法在跨领域、未见模型等OOD场景下的泛化能力有限，且缺乏可解释性。

Method: 提出GhostWriteBench数据集（包含50K+单词的长文本）和TRACE指纹方法。TRACE通过轻量级语言模型捕获token级转移模式（如词序）来创建可解释的指纹，适用于开源和闭源模型。

Result: 在GhostWriteBench上的实验表明，TRACE实现了最先进的性能，在OOD设置下保持鲁棒性，在有限训练数据场景下表现良好。

Conclusion: GhostWriteBench为LLM作者归属提供了有价值的基准数据集，TRACE方法在性能、鲁棒性和可解释性方面表现出色，为解决LLM生成文本的溯源问题提供了有效工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce GhostWriteBench, a dataset for LLM authorship attribution. It comprises long-form texts (50K+ words per book) generated by frontier LLMs, and is designed to test generalisation across multiple out-of-distribution (OOD) dimensions, including domain and unseen LLM author. We also propose TRACE -- a novel fingerprinting method that is interpretable and lightweight -- that works for both open- and closed-source models. TRACE creates the fingerprint by capturing token-level transition patterns (e.g., word rank) estimated by another lightweight language model. Experiments on GhostWriteBench demonstrate that TRACE achieves state-of-the-art performance, remains robust in OOD settings, and works well in limited training data scenarios.

</details>


### [348] [From Reviews to Requirements: Can LLMs Generate Human-Like User Stories?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28163)
*Shadman Sakib,Oishy Fatema Akhand,Tasnia Tasneem,Shohel Ahmed*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLMs能有效将应用商店评论转化为可用的用户故事，在流畅性和格式上可媲美甚至超越人类，但在生成独立、独特的用户故事方面仍有不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 应用商店评论包含大量用户反馈，但内容杂乱、非正式，难以手动大规模分析。现有自动化技术效果不佳，难以生成适用于敏捷项目的用户故事。

Method: 使用GPT-3.5 Turbo、Gemini 2.0 Flash和Mistral 7B Instruct等LLMs，在Mini-BAR数据集（1000+健康应用评论）上测试零样本、单样本和双样本提示方法。通过RUST框架进行人工评估，并使用基于UStAI微调的RoBERTa分类器评估质量。

Result: LLMs在编写流畅、格式良好的用户故事方面可匹配甚至超越人类，尤其在少样本提示下表现更好。但LLMs仍难以生成独立且独特的用户故事，这对构建敏捷待办事项至关重要。

Conclusion: LLMs能可靠地将非结构化应用评论转化为可操作的软件需求，为开发者提供清晰指导，将用户反馈转化为有意义的改进。

Abstract: App store reviews provide a constant flow of real user feedback that can help improve software requirements. However, these reviews are often messy, informal, and difficult to analyze manually at scale. Although automated techniques exist, many do not perform well when replicated and often fail to produce clean, backlog-ready user stories for agile projects.
  In this study, we evaluate how well large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-3.5 Turbo, Gemini 2.0 Flash, and Mistral 7B Instruct can generate usable user stories directly from raw app reviews. Using the Mini-BAR dataset of 1,000+ health app reviews, we tested zero-shot, one-shot, and two-shot prompting methods.
  We evaluated the generated user stories using both human judgment (via the RUST framework) and a RoBERTa classifier fine-tuned on UStAI to assess their overall quality. Our results show that LLMs can match or even outperform humans in writing fluent, well-formatted user stories, especially when few-shot prompts are used. However, they still struggle to produce independent and unique user stories, which are essential for building a strong agile backlog.
  Overall, our findings show how LLMs can reliably turn unstructured app reviews into actionable software requirements, providing developers with clear guidance to turn user feedback into meaningful improvements.

</details>


### [349] [DongYuan: An LLM-Based Framework for Integrative Chinese and Western Medicine Spleen-Stomach Disorders Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28191)
*Hua Li,Yingying Li,Xiaobin Feng,Xinyi Fu,Lifeng Dong,Qingfeng Yang,Yanzhe Chen,Xiaoju Feng,Zhidong Cao,Jianbin Guo,Yanru Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DongYuan框架，解决中西医结合脾胃病诊断中LLM面临的三大挑战：高质量数据缺乏、中西医推理逻辑融合能力不足、标准化评估基准缺失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脾胃病临床负担重，LLM在医疗应用中有潜力，但在中西医结合背景下存在三大挑战：缺乏高质量数据、缺少能有效融合中医辨证和西医疾病诊断推理逻辑的模型、缺乏标准化评估基准。

Method: 1) 构建三个中西医结合数据集(SSDF-Syndrome, SSDF-Dialogue, SSDF-PD)；2) 开发SSDF-Core核心诊断LLM，通过监督微调(SFT)和直接偏好优化(DPO)两阶段训练获得中西医推理能力；3) 开发SSDF-Navigator可插拔咨询导航模型优化临床问诊策略；4) 建立SSDF-Bench评估基准。

Result: SSDF-Core在SSDF-Bench上显著优于12个主流基线模型，DongYuan为智能中西医结合诊断系统的未来发展奠定了方法论基础并提供实用技术参考。

Conclusion: DongYuan框架成功解决了中西医结合脾胃病诊断中LLM面临的三大挑战，为智能中西医结合诊断系统的发展提供了坚实的方法论基础和实践技术参考。

Abstract: The clinical burden of spleen-stomach disorders is substantial. While large language models (LLMs) offer new potential for medical applications, they face three major challenges in the context of integrative Chinese and Western medicine (ICWM): a lack of high-quality data, the absence of models capable of effectively integrating the reasoning logic of traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) syndrome differentiation with that of Western medical (WM) disease diagnosis, and the shortage of a standardized evaluation benchmark. To address these interrelated challenges, we propose DongYuan, an ICWM spleen-stomach diagnostic framework. Specifically, three ICWM datasets (SSDF-Syndrome, SSDF-Dialogue, and SSDF-PD) were curated to fill the gap in high-quality data for spleen-stomach disorders. We then developed SSDF-Core, a core diagnostic LLM that acquires robust ICWM reasoning capabilities through a two-stage training regimen of supervised fine-tuning. tuning (SFT) and direct preference optimization (DPO), and complemented it with SSDF-Navigator, a pluggable consultation navigation model designed to optimize clinical inquiry strategies. Additionally, we established SSDF-Bench, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark focused on ICWM diagnosis of spleen-stomach disorders. Experimental results demonstrate that SSDF-Core significantly outperforms 12 mainstream baselines on SSDF-Bench. DongYuan lays a solid methodological foundation and provides practical technical references for the future development of intelligent ICWM diagnostic systems.

</details>


### [350] [Beyond Cosine Similarity: Zero-Initialized Residual Complex Projection for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28205)
*Yijin Wang,Fandi Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ZRCP框架，使用复数空间投影和相位解缠来分离方面语义与情感极性，通过抗碰撞掩码损失解决对比学习中的假阴性碰撞问题，在ABSA任务上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ABSA面临表示纠缠问题，方面语义和情感极性在实值嵌入空间中经常混淆。同时标准对比学习存在假阴性碰撞问题，对高频方面性能影响严重。

Method: 提出零初始化残差复数投影(ZRCP)框架，将文本特征投影到复数语义空间，利用相位解缠情感极性，振幅编码语义强度和词汇丰富度。引入抗碰撞掩码角度损失，保持极性内方面内聚性，扩大极性间判别边界。

Result: 框架达到0.8851的Macro-F1分数，为当前最佳性能。抗碰撞掩码使极性间判别边界扩大超过50%。几何分析表明约束振幅会过度正则化主观表示。

Conclusion: 无约束振幅和相位驱动的目标对于鲁棒的细粒度情感解缠至关重要。复数空间投影和抗碰撞机制有效解决了ABSA中的表示纠缠和假阴性碰撞问题。

Abstract: Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) is fundamentally challenged by representation entanglement, where aspect semantics and sentiment polarities are often conflated in real-valued embedding spaces. Furthermore, standard contrastive learning suffers from false-negative collisions, severely degrading performance on high-frequency aspects. In this paper, we propose a novel framework featuring a Zero-Initialized Residual Complex Projection (ZRCP) and an Anti-collision Masked Angle Loss,inspired by quantum projection and entanglement ideas. Our approach projects textual features into a complex semantic space, systematically utilizing the phase to disentangle sentiment polarities while allowing the amplitude to encode the semantic intensity and lexical richness of subjective descriptions. To tackle the collision bottleneck, we introduce an anti-collision mask that elegantly preserves intra-polarity aspect cohesion while expanding the inter-polarity discriminative margin by over 50%. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves a state-of-the-art Macro-F1 score of 0.8851. Deep geometric analyses further reveal that explicitly penalizing the complex amplitude catastrophically over-regularizes subjective representations, proving that our unconstrained-amplitude and phase-driven objective is crucial for robust, fine-grained sentiment disentanglement.

</details>


### [351] [\textit{Versteasch du mi?} Computational and Socio-Linguistic Perspectives on GenAI, LLMs, and Non-Standard Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28213)
*Verena Platzgummer,John McCrae,Sina Ahmadi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文批判性分析生成式AI对非标准语言（南蒂罗尔方言和库尔德语变体）的影响，探讨如何从技术角度处理非标准语言，以及这能否促进民主和去殖民化的数字策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型和生成式AI对少数语言存在不公平，加深数字语言鸿沟。这些技术不仅基于欧洲民族主义和殖民项目的历史语言标准化过程，还强化了语言作为"单一、单语、句法标准化意义系统"的认识论。需要批判性审视AI技术与语言政策、语言多样性的关系。

Method: 采用跨学科方法，结合批判社会语言学和计算语言学的专业知识。以南蒂罗尔方言（意大利南蒂罗尔地区广泛使用的非正式交际语言）和库尔德语变体为案例，探索生成式AI与语言变异、标准化的交叉点。

Result: 从技术角度讨论了如何让LLMs处理非标准语言，并分析了这种技术处理是否、何时以及如何能够促进"民主和去殖民化的数字及机器学习策略"。研究具有直接的政策意义。

Conclusion: 需要批判性审视AI技术与语言标准化、多样性的关系，探讨技术处理非标准语言的潜力及其对民主、去殖民化数字策略的政策影响。跨学科合作对于理解AI与语言变异的关系至关重要。

Abstract: The design of Large Language Models and generative artificial intelligence has been shown to be "unfair" to less-spoken languages and to deepen the digital language divide. Critical sociolinguistic work has also argued that these technologies are not only made possible by prior socio-historical processes of linguistic standardisation, often grounded in European nationalist and colonial projects, but also exacerbate epistemologies of language as "monolithic, monolingual, syntactically standardized systems of meaning". In our paper, we draw on earlier work on the intersections of technology and language policy and bring our respective expertise in critical sociolinguistics and computational linguistics to bear on an interrogation of these arguments. We take two different complexes of non-standard linguistic varieties in our respective repertoires--South Tyrolean dialects, which are widely used in informal communication in South Tyrol, Italy, as well as varieties of Kurdish--as starting points to an interdisciplinary exploration of the intersections between GenAI and linguistic variation and standardisation. We discuss both how LLMs can be made to deal with nonstandard language from a technical perspective, and whether, when or how this can contribute to "democratic and decolonial digital and machine learning strategies", which has direct policy implications.

</details>


### [352] [Categorical Perception in Large Language Model Hidden States: Structural Warping at Digit-Count Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28258)
*Jon-Paul Cacioli*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大语言模型在处理阿拉伯数字时，其隐藏状态表示中出现了类似人类分类感知的几何扭曲现象，这种扭曲发生在数字边界（如10和100），但并非所有模型都能明确报告类别区分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究大语言模型是否表现出类似人类分类感知的现象，即增强的类别边界区分能力，以及这种现象是否与模型架构和输入结构相关。

Method: 使用表征相似性分析，在五个架构家族的六个大语言模型中，比较分类感知加法模型（对数距离加边界增强）与纯连续模型在表示几何上的拟合效果。

Result: 在所有测试模型的主要层中，分类感知加法模型都优于纯连续模型；扭曲效应仅发生在结构定义的边界（10和100），在非边界位置或温度域中不存在；发现两种不同类型的分类感知："经典分类感知"（Gemma、Qwen）和"结构分类感知"（Llama、Mistral、Phi）。

Conclusion: 结构输入格式的不连续性足以在大语言模型中产生分类感知几何，独立于明确的语义类别知识，这表明分类感知现象可能源于输入结构而非语义理解。

Abstract: Categorical perception (CP) -- enhanced discriminability at category boundaries -- is among the most studied phenomena in perceptual psychology. This paper reports that analogous geometric warping occurs in the hidden-state representations of large language models (LLMs) processing Arabic numerals. Using representational similarity analysis across six models from five architecture families, the study finds that a CP-additive model (log-distance plus a boundary boost) fits the representational geometry better than a purely continuous model at 100% of primary layers in every model tested. The effect is specific to structurally defined boundaries (digit-count transitions at 10 and 100), absent at non-boundary control positions, and absent in the temperature domain where linguistic categories (hot/cold) lack a tokenisation discontinuity. Two qualitatively distinct signatures emerge: "classic CP" (Gemma, Qwen), where models both categorise explicitly and show geometric warping, and "structural CP" (Llama, Mistral, Phi), where geometry warps at the boundary but models cannot report the category distinction. This dissociation is stable across boundaries and is a property of the architecture, not the stimulus. Structural input-format discontinuities are sufficient to produce categorical perception geometry in LLMs, independently of explicit semantic category knowledge.

</details>


### [353] [Coconstructions in spoken data: UD annotation guidelines and first results](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28261)
*Ludovica Pannitto,Sylvain Kahane,Kaja Dobrovoljc,Elena Battaglia,Bruno Guillaume,Caterina Mauri,Eleonora Zucchini*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 为口语依存树库中跨话轮句法依存关系制定标注指南，提出两种表示方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决口语树库中跨话轮依存关系（如协作共建、问答、反馈语）的标注问题，完善通用依存框架下的口语标注

Method: 提出两种表示方法：基于话轮的说话者表示和跨话轮的依存表示；区分重构与修复，提升未完成短语中的元素

Result: 建立了跨话轮依存关系的系统标注框架，为口语树库提供了更全面的标注方案

Conclusion: 该标注指南完善了通用依存框架下的口语标注，能更好地处理口语对话中的复杂依存现象

Abstract: The paper proposes annotation guidelines for syntactic dependencies that span across speaker turns - including collaborative coconstructions proper, wh-question answers, and backchannels - in spoken language treebanks within the Universal Dependencies framework. Two representations are proposed: a speaker-based representation following the segmentation into speech turns, and a dependency-based representation with dependencies across speech turns. New propositions are also put forward to distinguish between reformulations and repairs, and to promote elements in unfinished phrases.

</details>


### [354] [Merge and Conquer: Instructing Multilingual Models by Adding Target Language Weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28263)
*Eneko Valero,Maria Ribalta i Albado,Oscar Sainz,Naiara Perez,German Rigau*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 模型合并可作为低资源语言适配LLM的轻量级替代方案，无需语言特定指令数据或重复微调


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM主要集中于英语，低资源语言性能有限。传统适配方法（如持续预训练）需要大量计算资源，对于指令模型还需要高质量指令数据，这些在低资源语言社区往往难以获取

Method: 探索通过将指令调优的LLM与语言特定的基础模型合并，来将语言知识迁移到指令调优模型中，避免了语言特定指令数据和重复微调过程。实验覆盖四种伊比利亚语言（巴斯克语、加泰罗尼亚语、加利西亚语、西班牙语）和两个模型系列

Result: 模型合并能够在新的语言中实现有效的指令跟随行为，甚至通过组合多个语言特定模型支持多语言能力。与传统适配方法相比，模型合并实现了竞争性性能，同时大幅降低计算成本

Conclusion: 模型合并是低资源语言传统适配方法的可行且高效替代方案，为低资源语言社区提供了轻量级的LLM适配方法

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain heavily centered on English, with limited performance in low-resource languages. Existing adaptation approaches, such as continual pre-training, demand significant computational resources. In the case of instructed models, high-quality instruction data is also required, both of which are often inaccessible for low-resource language communities. Under these constraints, model merging offers a lightweight alternative, but its potential in low-resource contexts has not been systematically explored. In this work, we explore whether it is possible to transfer language knowledge to an instruction-tuned LLM by merging it with a language-specific base model, thereby eliminating the need of language-specific instructions and repeated fine-tuning processes whenever stronger instructed variants become available. Through experiments covering four Iberian languages (Basque, Catalan, Galician, and Spanish) and two model families, we show that merging enables effective instruction following behavior in new languages and even supports multilingual capability through the combination of multiple language-specific models. Our results indicate that model merging is a viable and efficient alternative to traditional adaptation methods for low-resource languages, achieving competitive performance while greatly reducing computational cost.

</details>


### [355] [The Necessity of Setting Temperature in LLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28304)
*Lujun Li,Lama Sleem,Yangjie Xu,Yewei Song,Aolin Jia,Jerome Francois,Radu State*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了温度设置对LLM作为评判者性能的影响，发现温度对评判性能有显著影响，并通过因果推断框架提供了LLM中心评估流程的设计建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-as-a-Judge已成为评估文本质量和事实正确性的有效低成本范式。虽然先前研究表明LLM评判者与人类专家有高度一致性，但实践中研究人员通常使用固定的温度配置（如0.1和1.0），这种选择更多是经验性的而非基于原则。最近研究表明LLM性能对温度设置具有非平凡的敏感性，且这种影响高度依赖于任务。这引发了一个关键研究问题：温度是否影响LLM中心评估中的评判者性能？

Method: 通过一系列受控实验系统研究温度与评判性能之间的关系，并在实证统计分析中采用因果推断框架，严格检验温度对评判行为的直接因果效应。

Result: 研究发现温度对评判性能有显著影响，提供了关于温度设置如何影响LLM评判者行为的实证证据，并通过因果分析揭示了温度的直接效应。

Conclusion: 温度确实影响LLM评判者性能，研究结果为LLM中心评估流程的设计提供了可操作的工程见解，强调了在评估任务中需要仔细考虑温度设置的重要性。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has emerged as an effective and low-cost paradigm for evaluating text quality and factual correctness. Prior studies have shown substantial agreement between LLM judges and human experts, even on tasks that are difficult to assess automatically. In practice, researchers commonly employ fixed temperature configurations during the evaluation process-with values of 0.1 and 1.0 being the most prevalent choices-a convention that is largely empirical rather than principled. However, recent researches suggest that LLM performance exhibits non-trivial sensitivity to temperature settings, that lower temperatures do not universally yield optimal outcomes, and that such effects are highly task-dependent. This raises a critical research question: does temperature influence judge performance in LLM centric evaluation? To address this, we systematically investigate the relationship between temperature and judge performance through a series of controlled experiments, and further adopt a causal inference framework within our empirical statistical analysis to rigorously examine the direct causal effect of temperature on judge behavior, offering actionable engineering insights for the design of LLM-centric evaluation pipelines.

</details>


### [356] [Kernel-Smith: A Unified Recipe for Evolutionary Kernel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28342)
*He Du,Qiming Ge,Jiakai Hu,Aijun Yang,Zheng Cai,Zixian Huang,Sheng Yuan,Qinxiu Cheng,Xinchen Xie,Yicheng Chen,Yining Li,Jiaxing Xie,Huanan Dong,Yaguang Wu,Xiangjun Huang,Jian Yang,Hui Wang,Bowen Zhou,Bowen Li,Qipeng Guo,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Kernel-Smith是一个高性能GPU内核和算子生成框架，结合了稳定的评估驱动进化代理和进化导向的后训练方法，在多个GPU后端上实现了最先进的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前需要一种可靠的方法来自动生成和优化GPU内核，以应对不同硬件平台（如NVIDIA和MetaX GPU）的异构性，并实现从基准测试到实际生产系统的无缝迁移。

Method: 框架包含两个核心部分：1）进化代理维护可执行候选程序种群，利用编译、正确性和加速反馈进行迭代改进；2）将长时程进化轨迹转换为步进式监督和强化学习信号，训练模型作为进化循环中的局部改进器而非一次性生成器。

Result: 在NVIDIA Triton后端上，Kernel-Smith-235B-RL在KernelBench上实现了最佳平均加速比，超越了Gemini-3.0-pro和Claude-4.6-opus等前沿专有模型。在MetaX MACA后端上，Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B超越了DeepSeek-V3.2-think和Qwen3-235B-2507-think等大规模模型。

Conclusion: Kernel-Smith框架展示了LLM驱动的内核优化可以从受控评估转移到实际部署，为异构平台提供了无缝适应的潜力，并为SGLang和LMDeploy等生产系统做出了上游贡献。

Abstract: We present Kernel-Smith, a framework for high-performance GPU kernel and operator generation that combines a stable evaluation-driven evolutionary agent with an evolution-oriented post-training recipe. On the agent side, Kernel-Smith maintains a population of executable candidates and iteratively improves them using an archive of top-performing and diverse programs together with structured execution feedback on compilation, correctness, and speedup. To make this search reliable, we build backend-specific evaluation services for Triton on NVIDIA GPUs and Maca on MetaX GPUs. On the training side, we convert long-horizon evolution trajectories into step-centric supervision and reinforcement learning signals by retaining correctness-preserving, high-gain revisions, so that the model is optimized as a strong local improver inside the evolutionary loop rather than as a one-shot generator. Under a unified evolutionary protocol, Kernel-Smith-235B-RL achieves state-of-the-art overall performance on KernelBench with Nvidia Triton backend, attaining the best average speedup ratio and outperforming frontier proprietary models including Gemini-3.0-pro and Claude-4.6-opus. We further validate the framework on the MetaX MACA backend, where our Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B surpasses large-scale counterparts such as DeepSeek-V3.2-think and Qwen3-235B-2507-think, highlighting potential for seamless adaptation across heterogeneous platforms. Beyond benchmark results, the same workflow produces upstream contributions to production systems including SGLang and LMDeploy, demonstrating that LLM-driven kernel optimization can transfer from controlled evaluation to practical deployment.

</details>


### [357] [Not All Subjectivity Is the Same! Defining Desiderata for the Evaluation of Subjectivity in NLP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28351)
*Urja Khurana,Michiel van der Meer,Enrico Liscio,Antske Fokkens,Pradeep K. Murukannaiah*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该立场论文提出了主观性敏感模型的七个评估期望标准，分析了当前NLP研究中主观性评估的不足


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着NLP数据集越来越多地包含主观判断，模型需要反映多样化的观点，但现有评估方法是否与这些模型的目标一致仍是一个问题

Method: 采用自上而下的方法构建了七个评估期望标准，并扫描了60篇论文的实验设置来分析主观性评估的现状

Result: 发现主观性的多个方面仍被忽视：模糊输入与复调输入的区别、主观性是否有效传达给用户、不同期望标准之间缺乏互动等

Conclusion: 需要更全面的评估框架来确保主观性敏感模型能够真正反映多样化的观点，特别是关注少数群体的声音

Abstract: Subjective judgments are part of several NLP datasets and recent work is increasingly prioritizing models whose outputs reflect this diversity of perspectives. Such responses allow us to shed light on minority voices, which are frequently marginalized or obscured by dominant perspectives. It remains a question whether our evaluation practices align with these models' objectives. This position paper proposes seven evaluation desiderata for subjectivity-sensitive models, rooted in how subjectivity is represented in NLP data and models. The desiderata are constructed in a top-down approach, keeping in mind the user-centric impact of such models. We scan the experimental setup of 60 papers and show that various aspects of subjectivity are still understudied: the distinction between ambiguous and polyphonic input, whether subjectivity is effectively expressed to the user, and a lack of interplay between different desiderata, amongst other gaps.

</details>


### [358] [Tailoring AI-Driven Reading Scaffolds to the Distinct Needs of Neurodiverse Learners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28370)
*Soufiane Jhilal,Eleonora Pasqua,Caterina Marchesi,Riccardo Corradi,Martina Galletti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究比较了四种阅读支架对特殊教育需求学生的阅读理解影响，发现不同学习者对分段、象形图和关键词标签的反应各异，没有单一最优支架，需要可调节的个性化支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经多样性学习者需要阅读支持，但过多的支架可能造成认知负荷而非改善理解。研究基于建构-整合模型和情境支架视角，探索在监督性包容环境中，结构性与语义性支架如何影响理解和阅读体验。

Method: 使用改编的阅读界面，比较四种模式：未修改文本、句子分段文本、分段加象形图、分段加象形图和关键词标签。对14名特殊教育需求小学生进行组内试点研究，使用标准化问题测量阅读理解，收集儿童和治疗师报告的经验测量及开放式反馈。

Result: 结果呈现异质性反应：部分学习者从分段和象形图中受益，而另一些在引入视觉支架时表现出协调成本增加。体验评分显示模式间差异有限，临床复杂性影响感知理解难易度。开放式反馈常要求简化措辞和增加视觉支持。

Conclusion: 没有单一支架普遍最优，强调需要校准、可调节的支架设计，为监督性包容阅读环境中人机协同调节提供设计启示。

Abstract: Neurodiverse learners often require reading supports, yet increasing scaffold richness can sometimes overload attention and working memory rather than improve comprehension. Grounded in the Construction-Integration model and a contingent scaffolding perspective, we examine how structural versus semantic scaffolds shape comprehension and reading experience in a supervised inclusive context. Using an adapted reading interface, we compared four modalities: unmodified text, sentence-segmented text, segmented text with pictograms, and segmented text with pictograms plus keyword labels. In a within-subject pilot with 14 primary-school learners with special educational needs and disabilities, we measured reading comprehension using standardized questions and collected brief child- and therapist-reported experience measures alongside open-ended feedback. Results highlight heterogeneous responses as some learners showed patterns consistent with benefits from segmentation and pictograms, while others showed patterns consistent with increased coordination costs when visual scaffolds were introduced. Experience ratings showed limited differences between modalities, with some apparent effects linked to clinical complexity, particularly for perceived ease of understanding. Open-ended feedback of the learners frequently requested simpler wording and additional visual supports. These findings suggest that no single scaffold is universally optimal, reinforcing the need for calibrated, adjustable scaffolding and provide design implications for human-AI co-regulation in supervised inclusive reading contexts.

</details>


### [359] [Exploring Cultural Variations in Moral Judgments with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.12433)
*Hadi Mohammadi,Ayoub Bagheri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大型语言模型在反映跨文化道德价值观方面存在差异，先进指令调优模型比早期/小型模型更能匹配人类道德判断，但对W.E.I.R.D.国家（西方、教育发达、工业化、富裕、民主）的匹配度优于其他地区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是评估大型语言模型是否能够捕捉文化多样性的道德价值观，特别是比较不同模型在反映真实世界道德态度方面的表现，以及模型对不同地区道德观念的匹配程度。

Method: 使用基于对数概率的道德正当性评分方法，将多个LLM（包括GPT-2、OPT、BLOOMZ、Qwen等小型模型，以及GPT-4o、GPT-4o-mini、Gemma-2-9b-it、Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct等指令调优模型）的输出与世界价值观调查和皮尤研究中心全球态度调查数据进行比较和相关性分析。

Result: 早期或小型模型与人类道德判断的相关性接近零或为负值，而先进的指令调优模型显示出显著更高的正相关性。模型对W.E.I.R.D.国家道德观念的匹配度明显优于其他地区，尽管模型规模和指令调优能改善跨文化道德规范的匹配，但在某些主题和地区仍存在挑战。

Conclusion: 先进指令调优模型能更好地反映真实世界道德态度，但存在明显的文化偏见，对W.E.I.R.D.国家的匹配度更高。需要改进训练数据多样性、增强文化敏感性，并考虑信息检索等应用中的伦理影响。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across many tasks, but their ability to capture culturally diverse moral values remains unclear. In this paper, we examine whether LLMs mirror variations in moral attitudes reported by the World Values Survey (WVS) and the Pew Research Center's Global Attitudes Survey (PEW). We compare smaller monolingual and multilingual models (GPT-2, OPT, BLOOMZ, and Qwen) with recent instruction-tuned models (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Gemma-2-9b-it, and Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct). Using log-probability-based \emph{moral justifiability} scores, we correlate each model's outputs with survey data covering a broad set of ethical topics. Our results show that many earlier or smaller models often produce near-zero or negative correlations with human judgments. In contrast, advanced instruction-tuned models achieve substantially higher positive correlations, suggesting they better reflect real-world moral attitudes. We provide a detailed regional analysis revealing that models align better with Western, Educated, Industrialized, Rich, and Democratic (W.E.I.R.D.) nations than with other regions. While scaling model size and using instruction tuning improves alignment with cross-cultural moral norms, challenges remain for certain topics and regions. We discuss these findings in relation to bias analysis, training data diversity, information retrieval implications, and strategies for improving the cultural sensitivity of LLMs.

</details>


### [360] [Marco DeepResearch: Unlocking Efficient Deep Research Agents via Verification-Centric Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28376)
*Bin Zhu,Qianghuai Jia,Tian Lan,Junyang Ren,Feng Gu,Feihu Jiang,Longyue Wang,Zhao Xu,Weihua Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Marco DeepResearch是一个深度研究智能体，通过三层验证中心框架设计优化：在QA数据合成、轨迹构建和测试时扩展中引入验证机制，显著提升性能并超越多个基准模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度研究智能体在长期任务中需要可靠的验证机制，现有范式在QA数据合成、轨迹构建和测试时扩展中缺乏显式验证，导致错误传播和性能下降。

Method: 提出三层验证中心框架：1) QA数据合成中引入验证机制控制问题难度并确保答案唯一正确；2) 轨迹构建中设计验证驱动的轨迹合成方法注入显式验证模式；3) 测试时扩展中使用Marco DeepResearch自身作为验证器。

Result: Marco DeepResearch在大多数挑战性基准测试（如BrowseComp和BrowseComp-ZH）上显著优于8B规模的深度研究智能体，在600个工具调用预算下甚至超越或接近多个30B规模智能体。

Conclusion: 验证中心框架设计能有效提升深度研究智能体的性能，Marco DeepResearch展示了在资源有限情况下通过系统验证机制实现高性能的可行性。

Abstract: Deep research agents autonomously conduct open-ended investigations, integrating complex information retrieval with multi-step reasoning across diverse sources to solve real-world problems. To sustain this capability on long-horizon tasks, reliable verification is critical during both training and inference. A major bottleneck in existing paradigms stems from the lack of explicit verification mechanisms in QA data synthesis, trajectory construction, and test-time scaling. Errors introduced at each stage propagate downstream and degrade the overall agent performance. To address this, we present Marco DeepResearch, a deep research agent optimized with a verification-centric framework design at three levels: \textbf{(1)~QA Data Synthesis:} We introduce verification mechanisms to graph-based and agent-based QA synthesis to control question difficulty while ensuring answers are unique and correct; \textbf{(2)~Trajectory Construction:} We design a verification-driven trajectory synthesis method that injects explicit verification patterns into training trajectories; and \textbf{(3)~Test-time scaling:} We use Marco DeepResearch itself as a verifier at inference time and effectively improve performance on challenging questions. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed Marco DeepResearch agent significantly outperforms 8B-scale deep research agents on most challenging benchmarks, such as BrowseComp and BrowseComp-ZH. Crucially, under a maximum budget of 600 tool calls, Marco DeepResearch even surpasses or approaches several 30B-scale agents, like Tongyi DeepResearch-30B.

</details>


### [361] [LombardoGraphia: Automatic Classification of Lombard Orthography Variants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28418)
*Edoardo Signoroni,Pavel Rychlý*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究创建了首个伦巴第语正字法分类数据集LombardoGraphia，包含11,186个维基百科样本，涵盖9种正字法变体，并训练了24个分类模型，最佳模型整体准确率达96.06%，为伦巴第语NLP资源开发提供了基础设施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 伦巴第语是意大利北部和瑞士南部约380万人使用的资源匮乏语言，缺乏统一的正字法标准，存在多种正字法系统，这给NLP资源开发和模型训练带来了挑战。

Method: 1. 创建LombardoGraphia语料库：从维基百科收集11,186个伦巴第语样本，标注9种正字法变体；2. 处理和过滤原始内容以确保文本适合正字法分析；3. 训练24个传统和神经分类模型，使用不同特征和编码级别。

Result: 最佳模型整体准确率达到96.06%，平均类别准确率为85.78%。但由于数据不平衡，对少数类别的分类性能仍有挑战。

Conclusion: 该研究为伦巴第语构建了关键的基础设施，为开发能够识别不同正字法变体的NLP资源奠定了基础。

Abstract: Lombard, an underresourced language variety spoken by approximately 3.8 million people in Northern Italy and Southern Switzerland, lacks a unified orthographic standard. Multiple orthographic systems exist, creating challenges for NLP resource development and model training. This paper presents the first study of automatic Lombard orthography classification and LombardoGraphia, a curated corpus of 11,186 Lombard Wikipedia samples tagged across 9 orthographic variants, and models for automatic orthography classification. We curate the dataset, processing and filtering raw Wikipedia content to ensure text suitable for orthographic analysis. We train 24 traditional and neural classification models with various features and encoding levels. Our best models achieve 96.06% and 85.78% overall and average class accuracy, though performance on minority classes remains challenging due to data imbalance. Our work provides crucial infrastructure for building variety-aware NLP resources for Lombard.

</details>


### [362] [Structural-Ambiguity-Aware Translation from Natural Language to Signal Temporal Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28426)
*Kosei Fushimi,Kazunobu Serizawa,Junya Ikemoto,Kazumune Hashimoto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一种基于组合范畴语法的三阶段方法，将自然语言任务描述翻译成STL候选公式，保留歧义而非强制单一解释


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: STL广泛用于指定网络物理系统的定时和安全关键任务，但非专家用户难以直接编写STL公式。自然语言提供了便利接口，但其固有的结构歧义使得一对一翻译不可靠

Method: 基于组合范畴语法的三阶段管道：1) 歧义保留的n-best解析；2) STL导向的基于模板的语义组合；3) 规范化与分数聚合。输出带有可信度分数的去重STL候选集

Result: 案例研究表明，该方法能为真正歧义的输入生成多个STL候选，同时将无歧义或规范等价的推导折叠为单个STL公式

Conclusion: 提出的方法保留了附着和范围歧义，与现有的一对一最佳翻译方法形成对比，通过显式表示多个可能的正式解释来处理自然语言的固有歧义

Abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is widely used to specify timed and safety-critical tasks for cyber-physical systems, but writing STL formulas directly is difficult for non-expert users. Natural language (NL) provides a convenient interface, yet its inherent structural ambiguity makes one-to-one translation into STL unreliable. In this paper, we propose an \textit{ambiguity-preserving} method for translating NL task descriptions into STL candidate formulas. The key idea is to retain multiple plausible syntactic analyses instead of forcing a single interpretation at the parsing stage. To this end, we develop a three-stage pipeline based on Combinatory Categorial Grammar (CCG): ambiguity-preserving $n$-best parsing, STL-oriented template-based semantic composition, and canonicalization with score aggregation. The proposed method outputs a deduplicated set of STL candidates with plausibility scores, thereby explicitly representing multiple possible formal interpretations of an ambiguous instruction. In contrast to existing one-best NL-to-logic translation methods, the proposed approach is designed to preserve attachment and scope ambiguity. Case studies on representative task descriptions demonstrate that the method generates multiple STL candidates for genuinely ambiguous inputs while collapsing unambiguous or canonically equivalent derivations to a single STL formula.

</details>


### [363] [Courtroom-Style Multi-Agent Debate with Progressive RAG and Role-Switching for Controversial Claim Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28488)
*Masnun Nuha Chowdhury,Nusrat Jahan Beg,Umme Hunny Khan,Syed Rifat Raiyan,Md Kamrul Hasan,Hasan Mahmud*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PROClaim是一个法庭风格的多智能体框架，通过结构化对抗性辩论和渐进式RAG改进LLM的声明验证，在Check-COVID基准上达到81.7%准确率，比标准多智能体辩论提升10个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在高风险声明验证中不可靠，存在幻觉和浅层推理问题。现有的RAG和多智能体辩论方法受限于单次检索和非结构化辩论动态，需要更系统化的验证框架。

Method: 提出PROClaim框架：1) 法庭风格结构化辩论，包含原告、被告、法官等专业角色；2) 渐进式RAG(P-RAG)在辩论中动态扩展和精炼证据池；3) 证据协商、自我反思和异构多法官聚合机制确保校准、鲁棒性和多样性。

Result: 在Check-COVID基准的零样本评估中，PROClaim达到81.7%准确率，比标准多智能体辩论提升10.0个百分点，其中P-RAG贡献了主要性能增益(+7.5个百分点)。框架有效缓解了系统性偏见。

Conclusion: 结构化辩论和模型异质性为可靠的声明验证提供了坚实基础，PROClaim通过对抗性审议和渐进式证据检索显著提升了LLM验证的准确性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain unreliable for high-stakes claim verification due to hallucinations and shallow reasoning. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and multi-agent debate (MAD) address this, they are limited by one-pass retrieval and unstructured debate dynamics. We propose a courtroom-style multi-agent framework, PROClaim, that reformulates verification as a structured, adversarial deliberation. Our approach integrates specialized roles (e.g., Plaintiff, Defense, Judge) with Progressive RAG (P-RAG) to dynamically expand and refine the evidence pool during the debate. Furthermore, we employ evidence negotiation, self-reflection, and heterogeneous multi-judge aggregation to enforce calibration, robustness, and diversity. In zero-shot evaluations on the Check-COVID benchmark, PROClaim achieves 81.7% accuracy, outperforming standard multi-agent debate by 10.0 percentage points, with P-RAG driving the primary performance gains (+7.5 pp). We ultimately demonstrate that structural deliberation and model heterogeneity effectively mitigate systematic biases, providing a robust foundation for reliable claim verification. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/mnc13/PROClaim.

</details>


### [364] [TIEG-Youpu Solution for NeurIPS 2022 WikiKG90Mv2-LSC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28512)
*Feng Nie,Zhixiu Ye,Sifa Xie,Shuang Wu,Xin Yuan,Liang Yao,Jiazhen Peng,Xu Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对大规模知识图谱WikiKG90Mv2提出了一种检索-重排序两阶段方法，通过优先级填充检索和集成重排序模型，显著提升了链接预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: WikiKG90Mv2是一个包含超过9000万实体的大规模知识图谱，现有方法在处理如此大规模图谱时需要在效率和准确性之间取得平衡。知识图谱嵌入对于知识获取、问答系统和推荐系统等实际应用至关重要。

Method: 采用检索-重排序两阶段流水线：1) 提出优先级填充检索模型，获取结构和语义相似的候选实体；2) 提出基于集成的重排序模型，利用邻居增强表示在检索到的候选中产生最终链接预测结果。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法优于现有基线方法，将验证集的MRR从0.2342提升到0.2839，性能显著改善。

Conclusion: 针对大规模知识图谱WikiKG90Mv2，提出的检索-重排序框架通过创新的检索和重排序策略，有效平衡了效率和准确性，为大规模知识图谱嵌入提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: WikiKG90Mv2 in NeurIPS 2022 is a large encyclopedic knowledge graph. Embedding knowledge graphs into continuous vector spaces is important for many practical applications, such as knowledge acquisition, question answering, and recommendation systems. Compared to existing knowledge graphs, WikiKG90Mv2 is a large scale knowledge graph, which is composed of more than 90 millions of entities. Both efficiency and accuracy should be considered when building graph embedding models for knowledge graph at scale. To this end, we follow the retrieve then re-rank pipeline, and make novel modifications in both retrieval and re-ranking stage. Specifically, we propose a priority infilling retrieval model to obtain candidates that are structurally and semantically similar. Then we propose an ensemble based re-ranking model with neighbor enhanced representations to produce final link prediction results among retrieved candidates. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms existing baseline methods and improves MRR of validation set from 0.2342 to 0.2839.

</details>


### [365] [EarlySciRev: A Dataset of Early-Stage Scientific Revisions Extracted from LaTeX Writing Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28515)
*Léane Jourdan,Julien Aubert-Béduchaud,Yannis Chupin,Marah Baccari,Florian Boudin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EarlySciRev数据集：从arXiv LaTeX源码中自动提取早期科学文本修订对，包含578k已验证修订对，支持科学写作动态和修订建模研究


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公开资源通常只展示最终或接近最终版本的论文，限制了修订行为的实证研究和LLM在科学写作中的评估。需要早期修订痕迹的数据集来填补这一空白。

Method: 从arXiv LaTeX源文件中提取被注释掉的文本作为作者丢弃或替代的表述，将其与附近的最终文本对齐，获得段落级候选修订对，然后使用LLM进行过滤以保留真实的修订。

Result: 从128万候选对中获得了57.8万已验证的修订对，并提供了人工标注的修订检测基准。数据集基于真实的早期草稿痕迹。

Conclusion: EarlySciRev填补了现有专注于后期修订或合成重写资源的空白，支持科学写作动态、修订建模和LLM辅助编辑的研究。

Abstract: Scientific writing is an iterative process that generates rich revision traces, yet publicly available resources typically expose only final or near-final versions of papers. This limits empirical study of revision behaviour and evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for scientific writing. We introduce EarlySciRev, a dataset of early-stage scientific text revisions automatically extracted from arXiv LaTeX source files. Our key observation is that commented-out text in LaTeX often preserves discarded or alternative formulations written by the authors themselves. By aligning commented segments with nearby final text, we extract paragraph-level candidate revision pairs and apply LLM-based filtering to retain genuine revisions. Starting from 1.28M candidate pairs, our pipeline yields 578k validated revision pairs, grounded in authentic early drafting traces. We additionally provide a human-annotated benchmark for revision detection. EarlySciRev complements existing resources focused on late-stage revisions or synthetic rewrites and supports research on scientific writing dynamics, revision modelling, and LLM-assisted editing.

</details>


### [366] [GraphWalker: Agentic Knowledge Graph Question Answering via Synthetic Trajectory Curriculum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28533)
*Shuwen Xu,Yao Xu,Jiaxiang Liu,Chenhao Yuan,Wenshuo Peng,Jun Zhao,Kang Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GraphWalker是一个新颖的智能知识图谱问答框架，通过自动化轨迹合成和分阶段微调解决训练数据稀缺和推理泛化问题，在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能知识图谱问答方法存在训练数据稀缺和推理泛化挑战：基于提示的方法缺乏自主导航训练，而现有训练流程通常将推理限制在预定义轨迹中，限制了智能体的探索能力。

Method: 提出GraphWalker框架，采用两阶段监督微调训练范式：第一阶段在约束随机游走路径合成的结构多样化轨迹上训练，建立对知识图谱的广泛探索先验；第二阶段在小规模专家轨迹上进一步微调，发展反思和错误恢复能力。

Result: 在CWQ和WebQSP上达到最先进性能，在GrailQA和构建的GraphWalkerBench上验证了对外分布推理路径的泛化能力增强，分阶段SFT范式为轻量级强化学习阶段解锁了更高性能上限。

Conclusion: GraphWalker通过自动化轨迹合成和分阶段微调有效解决了智能知识图谱问答中的数据稀缺和泛化挑战，为智能体在知识图谱中的自主探索和推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Agentic knowledge graph question answering (KGQA) requires an agent to iteratively interact with knowledge graphs (KGs), posing challenges in both training data scarcity and reasoning generalization. Specifically, existing approaches often restrict agent exploration: prompting-based methods lack autonomous navigation training, while current training pipelines usually confine reasoning to predefined trajectories. To this end, this paper proposes \textit{GraphWalker}, a novel agentic KGQA framework that addresses these challenges through \textit{Automated Trajectory Synthesis} and \textit{Stage-wise Fine-tuning}. GraphWalker adopts a two-stage SFT training paradigm: First, the agent is trained on structurally diverse trajectories synthesized from constrained random-walk paths, establishing a broad exploration prior over the KG; Second, the agent is further fine-tuned on a small set of expert trajectories to develop reflection and error recovery capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our stage-wise SFT paradigm unlocks a higher performance ceiling for a lightweight reinforcement learning (RL) stage, enabling GraphWalker to achieve state-of-the-art performance on CWQ and WebQSP. Additional results on GrailQA and our constructed GraphWalkerBench confirm that GraphWalker enhances generalization to out-of-distribution reasoning paths. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/XuShuwenn/GraphWalker

</details>


### [367] [Compressing Transformer Language Models via Matrix Product Operator Decomposition: A Case Study on PicoGPT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28534)
*Younes Javanmard,Tanmoy Pandit,Masoud Mardani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MPO分解作为Transformer压缩方法，在PicoGPT上实现13倍压缩，chi=16时参数减少81%但保留97.7%基线准确率，chi=8模型在准确率/参数比上超过基线2.7倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer语言模型参数随隐藏维度二次增长，在资源受限硬件上部署成本高，需要寻找有效的压缩方法。

Method: 使用矩阵乘积算子（MPO）分解作为Transformer压缩方法，将权重矩阵分解为低秩核心链，通过键维度chi控制近似质量。在PicoGPT（约1M参数的GPT-2风格字符级模型）中用MPOLinear模块替换所有nn.Linear层，核心通过TT-SVD从预训练权重初始化或随机初始化，使用标准PyTorch自动微分训练。

Result: MPO压缩在chi=4时每个Transformer块实现13倍压缩；chi=16时参数从1,020,224减少到191,872（减少81%），保留97.7%基线token准确率（51.6% vs 52.8%）；chi=8模型在准确率/参数比上超过密集基线2.7倍；三站点分解比两站点分解在相同键维度下重构误差更低。

Conclusion: MPO参数化是Transformer压缩的实用且理论基础扎实的替代方案，优于低秩方法和非结构化剪枝，在保持性能的同时显著减少参数数量。

Abstract: Transformer-based language models achieve strong performance across NLP tasks, but their quadratic parameter scaling with hidden dimension makes deployment on resource-constrained hardware expensive. We study Matrix Product Operator (MPO) decomposition as a principled compression method for transformers. MPO factorises weight matrices into chains of low-rank cores, with approximation quality controlled by the bond dimension chi. We replace every nn.Linear layer in PicoGPT, a GPT-2-style character-level language model with about 1M parameters, with an MPOLinear module parameterised as an MPO chain. Cores are initialised either by TT-SVD from pretrained dense weights or from random initialisation, and trained using standard PyTorch autograd without a custom backward pass. We derive balanced factorisation schemes for the five distinct weight shapes in PicoGPT and evaluate bond dimensions chi in {4, 8, 16, 32} on Tiny Shakespeare. MPO compression achieves up to 13x compression per transformer block at chi = 4. At chi = 16, the model uses 191,872 parameters instead of 1,020,224 while retaining 97.7% of baseline token accuracy (51.6% vs 52.8%). Reconstruction error follows the expected trend and is lower for three-site than two-site factorisations at the same bond dimension. The chi = 8 model gives the best accuracy per parameter, exceeding the dense baseline by 2.7x on this metric. These results show that MPO parameterisation is a practical and theoretically grounded alternative to low-rank methods and unstructured pruning for transformer compression.

</details>


### [368] [Training data generation for context-dependent rubric-based short answer grading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28537)
*Pavel Šindelář,Dávid Slivka,Christopher Bouma,Filip Prášil,Ondřej Bojar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了利用少量机密数据创建大规模训练数据集的方法，用于自动评分学生答案，通过衍生文本格式保护数据隐私。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PISA测试需要避免语言差异和评分者偏差，自动评分方法需要大量领域特定数据进行训练，但机密数据获取困难。

Method: 使用少量机密数据集作为参考，通过衍生文本格式保护隐私，创建了三个替代数据集，比纯提示生成更接近原始数据。

Result: 成功创建了三个替代数据集，初步实验表明其中一种方法可能改善模型训练效果。

Conclusion: 通过简单衍生文本格式可以从少量机密数据创建大规模训练集，为自动评分提供数据支持，同时保护隐私。

Abstract: Every 4 years, the PISA test is administered by the OECD to test the knowledge of teenage students worldwide and allow for comparisons of educational systems. However, having to avoid language differences and annotator bias makes the grading of student answers challenging. For these reasons, it would be interesting to compare methods of automatic student answer grading. To train some of these methods, which require machine learning, or to compute parameters or select hyperparameters for those that do not, a large amount of domain-specific data is needed. In this work, we explore a small number of methods for creating a large-scale training dataset using only a relatively small confidential dataset as a reference, leveraging a set of very simple derived text formats to preserve confidentiality. Using these methods, we successfully created three surrogate datasets that are, at the very least, superficially more similar to the reference dataset than purely the result of prompt-based generation. Early experiments suggest one of these approaches might also lead to improved model training.

</details>


### [369] [EpiScreen: Early Epilepsy Detection from Electronic Health Records with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28698)
*Shuang Zhou,Kai Yu,Zaifu Zhan,Huixue Zhou,Min Zeng,Feng Xie,Zhiyi Sha,Rui Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EpiScreen：基于电子病历临床笔记的早期癫痫检测AI系统，通过微调大语言模型实现高精度诊断，在临床协作中提升神经科医生诊断准确率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 癫痫和心因性非癫痫发作症状相似但治疗策略完全不同，误诊常见且导致诊断延迟、不必要治疗和患者发病率增加。虽然视频脑电图是金标准，但成本高、可及性差限制了及时诊断。

Method: 开发低成本EpiScreen系统，利用电子健康记录中的常规临床笔记，通过微调大语言模型对标注笔记进行训练，实现早期癫痫检测。

Result: 在MIMIC-IV数据集上AUC达0.875，在明尼苏达大学私人队列中AUC达0.980。在临床协作场景中，EpiScreen辅助的神经科医生比未辅助专家表现提升10.9%。

Conclusion: EpiScreen支持早期癫痫检测，促进及时且经济有效的筛查，可能减少诊断延迟并避免不必要的干预，特别是在资源有限地区。

Abstract: Epilepsy and psychogenic non-epileptic seizures often present with similar seizure-like manifestations but require fundamentally different management strategies. Misdiagnosis is common and can lead to prolonged diagnostic delays, unnecessary treatments, and substantial patient morbidity. Although prolonged video-electroencephalography is the diagnostic gold standard, its high cost and limited accessibility hinder timely diagnosis. Here, we developed a low-cost, effective approach, EpiScreen, for early epilepsy detection by utilizing routinely collected clinical notes from electronic health records. Through fine-tuning large language models on labeled notes, EpiScreen achieved an AUC of up to 0.875 on the MIMIC-IV dataset and 0.980 on a private cohort of the University of Minnesota. In a clinician-AI collaboration setting, EpiScreen-assisted neurologists outperformed unaided experts by up to 10.9%. Overall, this study demonstrates that EpiScreen supports early epilepsy detection, facilitating timely and cost-effective screening that may reduce diagnostic delays and avoid unnecessary interventions, particularly in resource-limited regions.

</details>


### [370] [Adaptive Block-Scaled Data Types](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28765)
*Jack Cook,Hyemin S. Lee,Kathryn Le,Junxian Guo,Giovanni Traverso,Anantha P. Chandrakasan,Song Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出IF4（Int/Float 4）自适应4位量化格式，通过在每个16值组中智能选择FP4或INT4表示，并利用NVFP4未使用的符号位来标识数据类型，显著降低量化误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NVFP4作为流行的4位LLM量化格式存在局限性，特别是在处理接近最大值的数值时会产生较大量化误差。需要设计能自适应数值分布的新量化格式来提升性能。

Method: 提出自适应块缩放数据类型IF4：1）在每个16值组中根据数值分布选择FP4或INT4表示；2）使用E4M3缩放因子（与NVFP4相同）；3）利用NVFP4未使用的符号位标识数据类型选择；4）扩展设计IF3和IF6等其他位宽格式。

Result: IF4在量化训练中实现更低损失，在后训练量化中多项任务准确率更高，优于现有4位块缩放格式。同时设计了高效的IF4乘累加单元，证明可在下一代硬件加速器中高效实现。

Conclusion: IF4通过自适应选择FP4/INT4表示，有效解决了NVFP4的量化误差问题，在保持硬件友好性的同时显著提升了4位量化的性能，为下一代高效LLM部署提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: NVFP4 has grown increasingly popular as a 4-bit format for quantizing large language models due to its hardware support and its ability to retain useful information with relatively few bits per parameter. However, the format is not without limitations: recent work has shown that NVFP4 suffers from its error distribution, resulting in large amounts of quantization error on near-maximal values in each group of 16 values. In this work, we leverage this insight to design new Adaptive Block-Scaled Data Types that can adapt to the distribution of their input values. For four-bit quantization, our proposed IF4 (Int/Float 4) data type selects between FP4 and INT4 representations for each group of 16 values, which are then scaled by an E4M3 scale factor as is done with NVFP4. The selected data type is denoted using the scale factor's sign bit, which is currently unused in NVFP4, and we apply the same insight to design formats for other bit-widths, including IF3 and IF6. When used to quantize language models, we find that IF4 outperforms existing 4-bit block-scaled formats, achieving lower loss during quantized training and achieving higher accuracy on many tasks in post-training quantization. We additionally design and evaluate an IF4 Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) unit to demonstrate that IF4 can be implemented efficiently in next-generation hardware accelerators. Our code is available at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/fouroversix.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [371] [On the Carbon Footprint of Economic Research in the Age of Generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26712)
*Andres Alonso-Robisco,Carlos Esparcia,Francisco Jareño*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文将绿色AI分析单位从模型转向工作流，将提示视为决策策略，通过基准测试发现操作约束和决策规则提示能显著减少碳足迹，而通用绿色语言无效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI越来越多用于编写和重构研究代码，但现有绿色AI研究主要关注模型而非下游工作流。需要将分析单位从模型转向工作流，研究提示作为决策策略如何影响环境足迹

Method: 1. 将近期绿色AI文献映射为七个主题；2. 基准测试现代经济调查工作流（LDA文献映射），使用GenAI辅助编码并在固定云笔记本中执行，用CodeCarbon测量运行时间和CO2e估计；3. 测试不同类型提示（通用绿色语言、操作约束、决策规则）的效果

Result: 1. 文献映射显示训练足迹是最大集群，推理效率和系统级优化快速增长；2. 基准测试发现注入通用绿色语言到提示中无可靠效果，而操作约束和决策规则提示能实现大幅且稳定的足迹减少，同时保持决策等效的主题输出

Conclusion: 人在循环治理是协调GenAI生产力和环境效率的实际杠杆。将分析单位从模型转向工作流，并将提示视为决策策略，为绿色AI提供了新的治理视角

Abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to write and refactor research code, expanding computational workflows. At the same time, Green AI research has largely measured the footprint of models rather than the downstream workflows in which GenAI is a tool. We shift the unit of analysis from models to workflows and treat prompts as decision policies that allocate discretion between researcher and system, governing what is executed and when iteration stops. We contribute in two ways. First, we map the recent Green AI literature into seven themes: training footprint is the largest cluster, while inference efficiency and system level optimisation are growing rapidly, alongside measurement protocols, green algorithms, governance, and security and efficiency trade-offs. Second, we benchmark a modern economic survey workflow, an LDA-based literature mapping implemented with GenAI assisted coding and executed in a fixed cloud notebook, measuring runtime and estimated CO2e with CodeCarbon. Injecting generic green language into prompts has no reliable effect, whereas operational constraints and decision rule prompts deliver large and stable footprint reductions while preserving decision equivalent topic outputs. The results identify human in the loop governance as a practical lever to align GenAI productivity with environmental efficiency.

</details>


### [372] [GISclaw: An Open-Source LLM-Powered Agent System for Full-Stack Geospatial Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26845)
*Jinzhen Han,JinByeong Lee,Yuri Shim,Jisung Kim,Jae-Joon Lee*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: GISclaw是一个开源GIS代理系统，集成LLM推理核心与Python沙箱，支持矢量、栅格和表格数据的全栈地理空间分析，提供两种可插拔代理架构和六种LLM后端，在GeoAnalystBench基准测试中达到96%的任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的GIS代理存在数据类型覆盖有限（仅矢量）、依赖专有GIS平台以及单模型架构无法进行系统比较等限制，需要开发更全面、开放和可比较的GIS代理系统。

Method: 开发了GISclaw系统，包含LLM推理核心、持久Python沙箱、开源GIS库套件和Web交互界面。实现了两种可插拔代理架构（单代理ReAct循环和双代理计划-执行-重规划管道），支持六种异构LLM后端。通过模式分析、领域知识注入和错误记忆机制三大工程创新提升性能。

Result: 在50任务的GeoAnalystBench基准测试中达到96%的任务成功率。系统评估600个模型-架构-任务组合显示，双代理架构对强模型性能下降，对弱模型有边际增益。提出了包含代码结构分析、推理过程评估和类型特定输出验证的三层评估协议。

Conclusion: GISclaw是一个功能全面的开源GIS代理系统，通过创新的工程设计和系统评估，为自动化地理空间分析提供了强大的工具和评估框架，系统代码和评估代码均已公开。

Abstract: The convergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Geographic Information Science has opened new avenues for automating complex geospatial analysis. However, existing LLM-powered GIS agents are constrained by limited data-type coverage (vector-only), reliance on proprietary GIS platforms, and single-model architectures that preclude systematic comparisons. We present GISclaw, an open-source agent system that integrates an LLM reasoning core with a persistent Python sandbox, a comprehensive suite of open-source GIS libraries (GeoPandas, rasterio, scipy, scikit-learn), and a web-based interactive interface for full-stack geospatial analysis spanning vector, raster, and tabular data. GISclaw implements two pluggable agent architectures -- a Single Agent ReAct loop and a Dual Agent Plan-Execute-Replan pipeline -- and supports six heterogeneous LLM backends ranging from cloud-hosted flagship models (GPT-5.4) to locally deployed 14B models on consumer GPUs. Through three key engineering innovations -- Schema Analysis bridging the task-data information gap, Domain Knowledge injection for domain-specific workflows, and an Error Memory mechanism for intelligent self-correction -- GISclaw achieves up to 96% task success on the 50-task GeoAnalystBench benchmark. Systematic evaluation across 600 model--architecture--task combinations reveals that the Dual Agent architecture consistently degrades strong models while providing marginal gains for weaker ones. We further propose a three-layer evaluation protocol incorporating code structure analysis, reasoning process assessment, and type-specific output verification for comprehensive GIS agent assessment. The system and all evaluation code are publicly available.

</details>


### [373] [EZASP -- Facilitating the usage of ASP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26863)
*Rafael Martins,Matthias Knorr,Ricardo Gonçalves*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: EZASP是一个Visual Studio Code扩展，支持遵循Easy ASP方法论的ASP程序开发，提供语法检查、自动重构和教学辅助功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ASP是一种用于解决复杂组合问题的声明式编程语言，但学习难度较大，因为其声明式特性与命令式编程差异显著，且程序结构自由度高。虽然Easy ASP方法论旨在简化学习过程，但目前缺乏支持该方法的工具。

Method: 开发了EZASP这个VS Code扩展，它覆盖并扩展了Easy ASP的语言片段，提供语法错误高亮（包括非安全变量检测）、偏离方法论的警告、程序自动重排序功能，所有功能均可配置和禁用。

Result: 在大学教学环境中进行的小型用户研究表明，EZASP的功能对新用户和有经验的用户都有益处。

Conclusion: EZASP是一个实用的工具，支持Easy ASP方法论，通过提供语法检查、重构辅助和可配置功能，有助于降低ASP的学习门槛并提高开发效率。

Abstract: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a declarative programming language used for modeling and solving complex combinatorial problems. It has been successfully applied to a number of different realworld problems. However, learning its usage can prove challenging as the declarative language, from a conceptual perspective, differs substantially from imperative programming, and programs are not required to adhere to any particular structure, offering arguably almost too much freedom for a beginner. Recently, a new methodology called Easy Answer Set Programming (Easy ASP) has been introduced that aims to aid in this learning process by focussing on a well-defined fragment of the ASP language and introducing additional structure to the programs. However, while this methodology can indeed be employed, to the best of our knowledge, no tool integrates its features currently. In this paper, we present EZASP, a Visual Studio Code extension designed to support the development of ASP programs following the Easy ASP methodology. It covers and extends the language fragment of Easy ASP and provides the user with warnings in the case of deviations from the methodology as well as the possibility to automatically reorder the program. Complementarily, it also adds syntax error highlighting, including detection of non-safe variables directly while editing, and configurability, as all features can be optionally disabled. A small user study in the context of university teaching suggests that these features are benefitial for both new and experienced users.

</details>


### [374] [Efficiently Reproducing Distributed Workflows in Notebook-based Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26965)
*Talha Azaz,Raza Ahmad,Md Saiful Islam,Douglas Thain,Tanu Malik*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: NBRewind是一个笔记本内核系统，通过审计和重复两个内核实现分布式工作流的高效、可重复执行，支持增量检查点和部分重新执行，提升笔记本中分布式工作流的共享和可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 笔记本环境适合迭代开发和模块化执行，但分布式工作流在笔记本中的共享和复现仍然困难。即使小的代码或参数变更也常需要完整重新执行整个分布式工作流，限制了迭代开发。现有方法要么只针对单节点工作流，要么牺牲可复现性。

Method: NBRewind包含两个内核：审计内核（audit）和重复内核（repeat）。审计内核执行增量、单元格级别的检查点以避免不必要的重新运行；重复内核重建检查点并支持部分重新执行，包括管理分布式工作流的笔记本单元格。两个内核方法都基于跨单元格的数据流分析。

Result: 创建增量检查点仅增加最小开销，并支持在HPC系统上进行便携、跨站点的笔记本分布式工作流可复现。检查点和日志作为标准化笔记本规范的一部分，改善了共享和可复现性。

Conclusion: NBRewind解决了笔记本中分布式工作流执行的关键挑战，通过增量检查点和部分重新执行机制，在保持可复现性的同时提高了效率，支持更好的迭代开发和共享。

Abstract: Notebooks provide an author-friendly environment for iterative development, modular execution, and easy sharing. Distributed workflows are increasingly being authored and executed in notebooks, yet sharing and reproducing them remains challenging. Even small code or parameter changes often force full end-to-end re-execution of the distributed workflow, limiting iterative development for such workloads. Current methods for improving notebook execution operate on single-node workflows, while optimization techniques for distributed workflows typically sacrifice reproducibility. We introduce NBRewind, a notebook kernel system for efficient, reproducible execution of distributed workflows in notebooks. NBRewind consists of two kernels--audit and repeat. The audit kernel performs incremental, cell-level checkpointing to avoid unnecessary re-runs; repeat reconstructs checkpoints and enables partial re-execution including notebook cells that manage distributed workflow. Both kernel methods are based on data-flow analysis across cells. We show how checkpoints and logs when packaged as part of standardized notebook specification improve sharing and reproducibility. Using real-world case studies we show that creating incremental checkpoints adds minimal overhead and enables portable, cross-site reproducibility of notebook-based distributed workflows on HPC systems.

</details>


### [375] [Round-trip Engineering for Tactical DDD: A Constraint-Based Vision for the Masses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26987)
*Weixing Zhang,Mario Herb,Martin Armbruster,Bowen Jiang,Marcel Vielsack,Anne Koziolek*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于约束的战术建模环境，将DDD战术模式作为一等建模原语，通过实时约束验证和双向同步机制，降低DDD采用门槛，使战术DDD从需要专家监督的精英实践转变为可访问的工程学科。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 领域驱动设计（DDD）在管理复杂业务逻辑方面已证明其价值，但通用建模语言与战术DDD模式之间存在根本性的语义表达鸿沟，导致设计意图与实现之间持续偏离。需要解决这一差距，使战术DDD更易于采用。

Method: 构建基于约束的战术建模环境，核心包括：DDD原生元模型（战术模式作为一等建模原语）、实时约束验证引擎（防止建模期间的架构违规）、双向同步机制（通过往返工程保持模型-代码一致性）。

Result: 该方法旨在将专家级架构知识直接嵌入建模约束中，使小型团队和初级开发者能够构建复杂业务系统而不牺牲长期可维护性，降低DDD采用的技术障碍。

Conclusion: 通过工具支持的验证，将战术DDD从需要持续专家监督的精英实践转变为可访问的工程学科，实现DDD的民主化。

Abstract: Despite Domain-Driven Design's proven value in managing complex business logic, a fundamental semantic expressiveness gap persists between generic modeling languages and tactical DDD patterns, causing continuous divergence between design intent and implementation. We envision a constraint-based tactical modeling environment that transforms abstract architectural principles into explicit, tool-enforced engineering constraints. At its core is a DDD-native metamodel where tactical patterns are first-class modeling primitives, coupled with a real-time constraint verification engine that prevents architectural violations during modeling, and bidirectional synchronization mechanisms that maintain model-code consistency through round-trip engineering. This approach aims to democratize tactical DDD by embedding expert-level architectural knowledge directly into modeling constraints, enabling small teams and junior developers to build complex business systems without sacrificing long-term maintainability. By lowering the technical barriers to DDD adoption, we envision transforming tactical DDD from an elite practice requiring continuous expert oversight into an accessible engineering discipline with tool-supported verification.

</details>


### [376] [Etna: An Evaluation Platform for Property-Based Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27002)
*Alperen Keles,Jessica Shi,Nikhil Kamath,Tin Nam Liu,Ceren Mert,Harrison Goldstein,Benjamin C. Pierce,Leonidas Lampropoulos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ETNA是一个用于实证评估和比较属性测试技术的平台，整合了多个流行框架和测试工作负载，帮助用户理解不同方法的优劣和最佳实践。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 属性测试在函数式编程中很重要，但存在太多框架和策略，新用户难以选择，即使有经验的用户也不清楚哪种方法在特定情况下更好。现有文献缺乏严格的比较研究。

Method: 开发ETNA平台，整合多个流行PBT框架（Rocq、Haskell、OCaml、Racket、Rust）和文献中的测试工作负载，提供可扩展架构，自动处理性能测量等技术细节。

Result: 使用ETNA进行了多个实验，比较了不同PBT方法，帮助用户更清楚地理解最佳实践和权衡。

Conclusion: ETNA为PBT技术的实证评估提供了实用平台，填补了文献中缺乏严格比较的空白，有助于用户做出更明智的选择。

Abstract: Property-based testing is a mainstay of functional programming, boasting a rich literature, an enthusiastic user community, and an abundance of tools~ -- so many, indeed, that new users may have difficulty choosing. Moreover, any given framework may support a variety of strategies for generating test inputs; even experienced users may wonder which are better in any given situation. Sadly, the PBT literature, though long on creativity, is short on rigorous comparisons to help answer such questions.
  We present ETNA, a platform for empirical evaluation and comparison of PBT techniques. ETNA incorporates a number of popular PBT frameworks and testing workloads from the literature, and its extensible architecture makes adding new ones easy, while handling the technical drudgery of performance measurement.
  To illustrate its benefits, we use ETNA to carry out several experiments with popular PBT approaches in Rocq, Haskell, OCaml, Racket, and Rust, allowing users to more clearly understand best practices and tradeoffs.

</details>


### [377] [Predicting Program Correctness By Ensemble Semantic Entropy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27098)
*Yunxiang Wei,Tianlin Li,Yuwei Zheng,Yanni Dong,Aishan Liu,Qiang Hu,Xiaoyu Zhang,Mingfei Cheng,Jian Yang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Ensemble Semantic Entropy (ESE)方法，通过聚合多个模型的样本来评估不确定性，解决单模型一致性但错误的问题，在程序生成任务中显著提升正确性判断和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖单模型生成多个样本的一致性来评估程序正确性，但单模型可能收敛到一致但错误的解决方案，导致这种基于一致性的代理方法失效。

Method: 提出Ensemble Semantic Entropy (ESE)方法，通过评估跨模型集成样本的一致性来估计不确定性，并基于ESE提出Cas级联测试时扩展框架。

Result: 在LiveCodeBench上，ESE与程序正确性的相关性比单模型语义熵更强；在严格假阳性率约束的选择性生成任务中，预测准确率提升53.4%；Cas框架相比单模型扩展减少64.9%的FLOPs。

Conclusion: ESE方法能更有效地评估程序生成的不确定性，Cas框架为平衡参数和推理扩展提供了新视角，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in generating programs from natural language descriptions, yet ensuring their correctness without an external oracle remains a critical challenge. To solve the challenge, existing methods often rely on uncertainty estimation, measuring the consistency of semantics or execution behaviors across multiple samples generated by a single model. However, we observe that a single model can often converge to a consistent but incorrect solution, rendering such consistency-based proxies ineffective. To address this, we propose Ensemble Semantic Entropy (ESE), which estimates uncertainty by evaluating the consistency of samples aggregated across an ensemble of models. Experiments on LiveCodeBench demonstrate that ESE correlates more strongly with program correctness than single-model semantic entropy. Notably, in selective generation tasks with strict false-positive rate constraints, ESE improves prediction accuracy by 53.4%. Furthermore, by leveraging ESE as the decision signal, we propose a cascading test-time scaling framework Cas, which maintains performance while reducing FLOPs by 64.9% compared to single-model scaling, offering a new perspective on balancing parameter and inference scaling.

</details>


### [378] [A Large-Scale Comprehensive Measurement of AI-Generated Code in Real-World Repositories A Large-Scale Comprehensive Measurement of AI-Generated Code in Real-World Repositories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27130)
*Tianhao Mao,Dongfang Zhao,Haixu Tang,Xiaofeng Wang,Hang Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文对现实世界代码库中的AI生成代码进行了大规模实证研究，分析了代码级和提交级特征，揭示了AI生成代码与人工编写代码的差异及其对开发实践的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI生成代码越来越多地集成到实际系统中，理解其特征和影响变得至关重要。先前的研究主要集中在小型、受控的评估上，缺乏对现实世界环境的全面分析。

Method: 开发了基于启发式过滤和LLM分类的方法来识别AI生成代码，构建了大规模数据集，分析了代码级指标（如复杂度、结构和缺陷相关指标）和提交级特征（如提交大小、频率和提交后稳定性）。

Result: 研究结果提供了关于AI生成代码与人工编写代码差异的新见解，以及AI辅助如何影响开发实践。这些发现有助于更深入地理解AI辅助编程的实际影响。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了AI生成代码在现实世界环境中大规模实证分析的空白，为理解AI辅助编程的实际影响提供了重要基础，有助于指导未来的研究和实践。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly transforming software engineering by enabling developers to generate code ranging from small snippets to entire projects. As AI-generated code becomes increasingly integrated into real-world systems, understanding its characteristics and impact is critical. However, prior work primarily focuses on small-scale, controlled evaluations and lacks comprehensive analysis in real-world settings.
  In this paper, we present a large-scale empirical study of AI-generated code in real-world repositories. We analyze both code-level metrics (\eg complexity, structure, and defect-related indicators) and commit-level characteristics (\eg commit size, frequency, and post-commit stability). To enable this study, we develop heuristic filter with LLM classification to identify AI-generated code and construct a large dataset.
  Our results provide new insights into how AI-generated code differs from human-written code and how AI assistance influences development practices. These findings contribute to a deeper understanding of the practical implications of AI-assisted programming.

</details>


### [379] [The First Issue Matters: Linking Task-Level Characteristics to Long-Term Newcomer Retention in OSS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27136)
*Yichen Hao,Weiwei Xu,Kai Gao,Xiaofang Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究开源社区中新手首次解决问题的特性如何影响其长期留存，发现互动相关特性比问题本身属性更重要，并识别出能提高留存的最佳问题特征组合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽然探索了各种任务推荐方法帮助新手解决第一个问题，但忽视了第一个问题的特性如何影响新手的长期留存。这限制了我们理解初始成功是否会导致持续参与，也阻碍了有效的入门设计。

Method: 进行大规模实证研究，结合预测分析、可解释性技术和因果推断来估计问题特性对留存结果的因果效应。预测任务支持解释，因果分析揭示关键影响因素。

Result: 互动相关特性比内在问题属性与留存有更强关联。因果分析显示：由中等经验贡献者报告的问题、伴随中等讨论强度、项目成员参与、中性或轻微负面评论情感的问题具有更高的留存潜力。

Conclusion: 研究结果为开源维护者提供了可操作的见解，帮助他们设计更好的问题管理实践来支持新手长期留存。首次成功不一定保证持续参与，需要关注问题的社交互动特性。

Abstract: Sustaining newcomer participation is critical for the long-term health of open-source communities. Although prior research has explored various task recommendation approaches to help newcomers resolve their first-issue, these methods overlook how characteristics of first-issues may influence newcomers' long-term retention, limiting our understanding of whether initial success leads to sustained participation and hindering effective onboarding design. In this paper, we conduct a large-scale empirical study to examine how first-issue characteristics affect newcomer retention. We combine predictive analysis, interpretability techniques, and causal inference to estimate the causal effects of issue characteristics on retention outcomes. The prediction task supports the interpretation and shows that interaction-related characteristics exhibit stronger associations with retention than intrinsic issue attributes. The causal analysis further reveals that issues reported by moderately experienced contributors, accompanied by moderate discussion intensity and participation from project members, and neutral or slightly negative comment sentiment, have higher retention potential. These findings provide actionable insights for OSS maintainers on designing issue management practices that better support long-term newcomer retention.

</details>


### [380] [Finding Memory Leaks in C/C++ Programs via Neuro-Symbolic Augmented Static Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27224)
*Huihui Huang,Jieke Shi,Bo Wang,Zhou Yang,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MemHint是一个神经符号化管道，结合LLM的代码语义理解和Z3符号推理，通过识别项目特定的内存管理函数和路径敏感分析，显著提升了C/C++代码中内存泄漏的检测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态分析工具（如CodeQL）在检测C/C++内存泄漏时存在两个主要问题：1）无法识别项目特定的自定义内存管理函数；2）缺乏路径敏感的控制流建模，导致大量漏报。
