Method: MemHint采用神经符号化管道：1）使用LLM分析代码库，将函数分类为内存分配器、释放器或两者都不是，生成记录内存所有权传递的函数摘要；2）基于Z3的验证步骤检查每个摘要的控制流图可行性；3）将验证后的摘要注入CodeQL和Infer；4）Z3路径可行性过滤消除不可行路径的警告；5）最终LLM验证确认剩余警告是否为真正的bug。

Result: 在7个真实世界的C/C++项目（总计超过340万行代码）中，MemHint检测到52个独特的内存泄漏（47个已确认/修复，4个CVE已提交），而原始CodeQL仅检测到19个，原始Infer仅检测到3个，每个检测到的bug成本约为1.7美元。

Conclusion: MemHint通过结合LLM的语义理解和符号推理，有效解决了现有静态分析工具在检测内存泄漏时的局限性，显著提高了检测准确性和覆盖率，为大规模代码库的内存安全分析提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Memory leaks remain prevalent in real-world C/C++ software. Static analyzers such as CodeQL provide scalable program analysis but frequently miss such bugs because they cannot recognize project-specific custom memory-management functions and lack path-sensitive control-flow modeling. We present MemHint, a neuro-symbolic pipeline that addresses both limitations by combining LLMs' semantic understanding of code with Z3-based symbolic reasoning. MemHint parses the target codebase and applies an LLM to classify each function as a memory allocator, deallocator, or neither, producing function summaries that record which argument or return value carries memory ownership, extending the analyzer's built-in knowledge beyond standard primitives such as malloc and free. A Z3-based validation step checks each summary against the function's control-flow graph, discarding those whose claimed memory operation is unreachable on any feasible path. The validated summaries are injected into CodeQL and Infer via their respective extension mechanisms. Z3 path feasibility filtering then eliminates warnings on infeasible paths, and a final LLM-based validation step confirms whether each remaining warning is a genuine bug. On seven real-world C/C++ projects totaling over 3.4M lines of code, MemHint detects 52 unique memory leaks (47 confirmed/fixed, 4 CVEs submitted) at approximately $1.7 per detected bug, compared to 19 by vanilla CodeQL and 3 by vanilla Infer.

</details>


### [381] ["An Endless Stream of AI Slop": The Growing Burden of AI-Assisted Software Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27249)
*Sebastian Baltes,Marc Cheong,Christoph Treude*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文通过分析Reddit和Hacker News的1154个帖子，研究开发者对"AI slop"（低质量AI生成内容）的认知和应对，发现其导致审查摩擦、质量下降和系统性后果，被框架为"公地悲剧"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI生成的低质量内容（AI slop）正日益影响软件开发，包括生成的代码、拉取请求、文档和错误报告等。然而，关于开发者如何感知和应对这一现象的经验研究还很有限。

Method: 对Reddit和Hacker News上15个讨论线程的1154个帖子进行定性分析，开发了包含15个代码的代码本，组织成三个主题集群。

Result: 识别出三个主要主题：审查摩擦（AI slop如何加重审查负担、侵蚀信任并引发应对措施）、质量下降（对代码库、知识资源和开发者能力的损害）、力量与后果（系统性激励、强制采用、工艺侵蚀和劳动力破坏）。研究发现AI slop可被视为"公地悲剧"，个体生产力提升将成本外部化给审查者、维护者和更广泛的社区。

Conclusion: 研究提供了开发者关注的问题和提出的缓解策略，为工具开发者、团队领导和教育工作者提供了可操作的见解。AI slop问题需要系统性解决方案来平衡个体效率与集体质量。

Abstract: "AI slop", that is, low-quality AI-generated content, is increasingly affecting software development, from generated code and pull requests to documentation and bug reports. However, there is limited empirical research on how developers perceive and respond to this phenomenon. We conducted a qualitative analysis of 1,154 posts across 15 discussion threads from Reddit and Hacker News, developing a codebook of 15 codes organized into three thematic clusters: Review Friction (how AI slop burdens reviewers, erodes trust, and prompts countermeasures), Quality Degradation (damage to codebases, knowledge resources, and developer competence), and Forces and Consequences (systemic incentives, mandated adoption, craft erosion, and workforce disruption). Our findings frame AI slop as a tragedy of the commons, where individual productivity gains externalize costs onto reviewers, maintainers, and the broader community. We report the concerns developers raise and the mitigation strategies they propose, offering actionable insights for tool developers, team leads, and educators.

</details>


### [382] [Codebase-Memory: Tree-Sitter-Based Knowledge Graphs for LLM Code Exploration via MCP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27277)
*Martin Vogel,Falk Meyer-Eschenbach,Severin Kohler,Elias Grünewald,Felix Balzer*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Codebase-Memory是一个基于知识图谱的代码库理解系统，通过Tree-Sitter解析66种语言，相比传统文件探索方法，在保持83%回答质量的同时，减少了90%的token消耗和2.1倍的工具调用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM代码代理通过重复文件读取和grep搜索来探索代码库，消耗大量token且缺乏结构化理解。需要一种更高效、结构化的代码库理解方法。

Method: 使用Model Context Protocol (MCP)构建持久化的Tree-Sitter知识图谱，通过多阶段流水线处理，包括并行工作池、调用图遍历、影响分析和社区发现，支持66种编程语言。

Result: 在31个真实代码库评估中，Codebase-Memory达到83%回答质量（相比文件探索代理的92%），但token消耗减少10倍，工具调用减少2.1倍。在图原生查询（如枢纽检测和调用者排名）上，在19/31语言中匹配或超越探索器。

Conclusion: Codebase-Memory提供了一种更高效的代码库理解方法，通过知识图谱显著减少资源消耗，特别适合图原生查询任务，为LLM代码代理提供了结构化探索的新范式。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) coding agents typically explore codebases through repeated file-reading and grep-searching, consuming thousands of tokens per query without structural understanding. We present Codebase-Memory, an open-source system that constructs a persistent, Tree-Sitter-based knowledge graph via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), parsing 66 languages through a multi-phase pipeline with parallel worker pools, call-graph traversal, impact analysis, and community discovery. Evaluated across 31 real-world repositories, Codebase-Memory achieves 83% answer quality versus 92% for a file-exploration agent, at ten times fewer tokens and 2.1 times fewer tool calls. For graph-native queries such as hub detection and caller ranking, it matches or exceeds the explorer on 19 of 31 languages.

</details>


### [383] [A Multi-agent AI System for Deep Learning Model Migration from TensorFlow to JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27296)
*Stoyan Nikolov,Bernhard Konrad,Moritz Gronbach,Niket Kumar,Ann Yan,Varun Singh,Yaning Liang,Parthasarathy Ranganathan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI多智能体系统自动将TensorFlow模型迁移到JAX，实现6.4-8倍加速，AI支持自身开发工作流


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI产品和模型的快速发展，深度学习框架不断更新。Google在众多产品中使用机器学习，但维护不同框架和版本的模型源代码是巨大挑战。目前迁移工作主要依赖人工专家，效率低下且成本高昂。

Method: 构建基于AI的多智能体系统：1) AI规划器结合静态分析和AI指令创建迁移计划；2) 编排器和编码器遵循AI生成的示例剧本执行迁移；3) 定义质量指标和基于AI的评判器来评估无测试代码；4) 系统在大型超大规模环境中验证。

Result: 系统显著加速深度学习模型迁移（6.4-8倍速度提升），在商业实际用例中验证有效。创建了良性循环，AI支持自身开发工作流。

Conclusion: 该方法可推广到其他框架迁移和通用代码转换任务。AI多智能体系统能有效解决复杂代码迁移问题，减少人工干预，提高效率。

Abstract: The rapid development of AI-based products and their underlying models has led to constant innovation in deep learning frameworks. Google has been pioneering machine learning usage across dozens of products. Maintaining the multitude of model source codes in different ML frameworks and versions is a significant challenge. So far the maintenance and migration work was done largely manually by human experts. We describe an AI-based multi-agent system that we built to support automatic migration of TensorFlow-based deep learning models into JAX-based ones. We make three main contributions: First, we show how an AI planner that uses a mix of static analysis with AI instructions can create migration plans for very complex code components that are reliably followed by the combination of an orchestrator and coders, using AI-generated example-based playbooks. Second, we define quality metrics and AI-based judges that accelerate development when the code to evaluate has no tests and has to adhere to strict style and dependency requirements. Third, we demonstrate how the system accelerates code migrations in a large hyperscaler environment on commercial real-world use-cases. Our approach dramatically reduces the time (6.4x-8x speedup) for deep learning model migrations and creates a virtuous circle where effectively AI supports its own development workflow. We expect that the techniques and approaches described here can be generalized for other framework migrations and general code transformation tasks.

</details>


### [384] [Unveiling Code Clones in the Eclipse IIoT Software Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27308)
*Zengyang Li,Binbin Huang,Yimeng Li,Ran Mo,Peng Liang,Hui Liu,Yutao Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究调查了Eclipse IIoT开源项目中代码克隆的普遍性、演化和共同修改情况，发现克隆代码比例高达16.3%，是传统开源项目的近两倍，对软件维护有潜在负面影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业物联网开源项目中开发者经常为了效率重用代码和配置，这可能导致代码克隆扩散和维护挑战，但IIoT OSS领域中代码克隆的程度和影响尚未得到充分研究。

Method: 从Eclipse IIoT OSS生态系统中收集了15个项目的90个发布版本，使用NiCad工具和自定义分析模块，基于源代码和变更历史调查代码克隆情况，涵盖克隆分布、模式、演化趋势、共同修改克隆和跨项目克隆。

Result: 1) Eclipse IIoT OSS项目中代码克隆普遍，16.3%的代码行涉及克隆；2) 大多数克隆发生在提交之间，但仍有显著比例的克隆对发生在单个提交内；3) 大多数项目在版本迭代中克隆数量保持稳定；4) 平均0.17%的克隆被共同修改，影响维护；5) 跨项目克隆普遍，Java项目比C项目更多，但共同修改罕见(0.02%)。

Conclusion: 研究结果突显了代码克隆对软件维护的潜在负面影响，强调需要解决这些问题以提高整体软件质量。

Abstract: Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) has become a prominent topic recently, with an increasing number of IIoT OSS projects emerging, also within the Eclipse Foundation. Code cloning is a common practice that can adversely affect software maintenance. In the IIoT OSS domain, developers frequently reuse code and configurations for efficiency, which can lead to code clone proliferation and maintenance challenges. However, the extent and effects of code clones in the IIoT OSS domain remain understudied. This study aims to investigate the prevalence, evolution, and co-modification of code clones within the Eclipse IIoT OSS ecosystem. We collected 90 release versions from 15 projects in the Eclipse IIoT OSS ecosystem, and investigated their code clone situations based on source code and change history using the NiCad tool and our custom analysis module. The investigation covered clone distribution, patterns, evolution trends, co-modified clones, and cross-project clones. 1) Code clones are prevalent in Eclipse IIoT OSS projects, with 16.3% of code lines involved in clones - nearly twice the proportion observed in traditional OSS projects; 2) Most code clones occur between commits, while there are still a significant proportion of code clones that each clone pair happens within a commit; 3) Most Eclipse IIoT projects remain stable in clone numbers during version iterations; 4) An average of 0.17% of the clones have been co-modified, which negatively affect maintenance; and 5) Cross-project clone pairs are prevalent, more in Java than in C projects, with rare co-modifications (0.02%) only in Java projects. Our findings highlight the potential negative impacts of these clones on software maintenance, emphasizing the need to address these issues to improve overall software quality.

</details>


### [385] [ComBench: A Repo-level Real-world Benchmark for Compilation Error Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27333)
*Jia Li,Zeyang Zhuang,Zhuangbin Chen,Yuxin Su,Wei Meng,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ComBench：首个面向C/C++编译错误修复的仓库级、可复现的真实世界基准测试，通过自动化框架从GitHub CI历史中挖掘真实失败案例，评估发现LLM在语法正确性（73%）与语义正确性（41%）之间存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动编译错误修复（ACER）技术的真实世界性能评估不足，主要因为现有基准测试存在局限性：去上下文化的单文件数据、缺乏真实的源代码多样性、以及忽略仓库级复杂性的局部任务建模偏差。

Method: 提出ComBench基准测试，通过自动化框架从大规模开源项目的GitHub CI历史中系统挖掘真实失败案例，包含高精度识别复杂版本历史中的修复补丁和高保真复现原始构建环境的技术，所有样本都经过执行验证。

Result: 评估12个现代LLM在直接和基于代理的修复设置下，发现模型在实现语法正确性（GPT-5达到73%成功率）与确保语义正确性（仅41%补丁有效）之间存在显著差距，不同模型对不同错误类型表现出不同的专业化能力。

Conclusion: ComBench为ACER技术未来发展提供了稳健且现实的平台，能够应对现代软件开发的复杂性，揭示了当前LLM在编译错误修复中语法与语义能力的不匹配问题。

Abstract: Compilation errors pose pervasive and critical challenges in software development, significantly hindering productivity. Therefore, Automated Compilation Error Repair (ACER) techniques are proposed to mitigate these issues. Despite recent advancements in ACER, its real-world performance remains poorly evaluated. This can be largely attributed to the limitations of existing benchmarks, \ie decontextualized single-file data, lack of authentic source diversity, and biased local task modeling that ignores crucial repository-level complexities. To bridge this critical gap, we propose ComBench, the first repository-level, reproducible real-world benchmark for C/C++ compilation error repair. ComBench is constructed through a novel, automated framework that systematically mines real-world failures from the GitHub CI histories of large-scale open-source projects. Our framework contributes techniques for the high-precision identification of ground-truth repair patches from complex version histories and a high-fidelity mechanism for reproducing the original, ephemeral build environments. To ensure data quality, all samples in ComBench are execution-verified -- guaranteeing reproducible failures and build success with ground-truth patches. Using ComBench, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 12 modern LLMs under both direct and agent-based repair settings. Our experiments reveal a significant gap between a model's ability to achieve syntactic correctness (a 73% success rate for GPT-5) and its ability to ensure semantic correctness (only 41% of its patches are valid). We also find that different models exhibit distinct specializations for different error types. ComBench provides a robust and realistic platform to guide the future development of ACER techniques capable of addressing the complexities of modern software development.

</details>


### [386] [Safer Builders, Risky Maintainers: A Comparative Study of Breaking Changes in Human vs Agentic PRs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27524)
*K M Ferdous,Dipayan Banik,Kowshik Chowdhury,Shazibul Islam Shamim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI编码代理在代码生成任务中比人类引入更少的破坏性变更（3.45% vs 7.40%），但在维护任务（重构和杂项变更）中风险更高，存在"信心陷阱"现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然AI编码代理提高了开发效率，但生成的代码通常比人类代码有更多bug和安全问题。人类PR经常破坏向后兼容性，但AI代理PR引入破坏性变更的风险尚未充分研究。本文旨在帮助开发者和研究者评估AI生成PR的可靠性。

Method: 对AIDev数据集中Python仓库的7,191个AI生成PR和1,402个人类PR进行对比分析。开发了一个工具，分析对应提交的代码变更，利用基于抽象语法树（AST）的分析来检测潜在的破坏性变更。

Result: AI代理在代码生成任务中总体引入更少的破坏性变更（3.45% vs 7.40%）。但在维护任务中风险显著更高：重构变更引入破坏性变更率为6.72%，杂项变更为9.35%。发现"信心陷阱"现象：即使AI代理高度自信的PR仍会引入破坏性变更。

Conclusion: AI编码代理在代码生成任务中比人类更安全，但在维护任务中风险更高。需要更严格的审查，特别是在维护导向的变更中，无论AI报告的信心分数如何。这表明不能仅依赖AI的自信度来评估PR质量。

Abstract: AI coding agents are increasingly integrated into modern software engineering workflows, actively collaborating with human developers to create pull requests (PRs) in open-source repositories. Although coding agents improve developer productivity, they often generate code with more bugs and security issues than human-authored code. While human-authored PRs often break backward compatibility, leading to breaking changes, the potential for agentic PRs to introduce breaking changes remains underexplored. The goal of this paper is to help developers and researchers evaluate the reliability of AI-generated PRs by examining the frequency and task contexts in which AI agents introduce breaking changes. We conduct a comparative analysis of 7,191 agent-generated PRs with 1402 human-authored PRs from Python repositories in the AIDev dataset. We develop a tool that analyzes code changes in commits corresponding to the agentic PRs and leverages an abstract syntax tree (AST) based analysis to detect potential breaking changes. Our findings show that AI agents introduce fewer breaking changes overall than humans (3.45% vs. 7.40%) in code generation tasks. However, agents exhibit substantially higher risk during maintenance tasks, with refactoring and chore changes introducing breaking changes at rates of 6.72% and 9.35%, respectively. We also identify a "Confidence Trap" where highly confident agentic PRs still introduce breaking changes, indicating the need for stricter review during maintenance oriented changes regardless of reported confidence score.

</details>


### [387] [Understanding NPM Malicious Package Detection: A Benchmark-Driven Empirical Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27549)
*Wenbo Guo,Zhongwen Chen,Zhengzi Xu,Chengwei Liu,Ming Kang,Shiwen Song,Chengyue Liu,Yijia Xu,Weisong Sun,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对NPM恶意软件检测工具进行基准评估，构建包含恶意和良性包的数据集，评估8个工具的13个变体，揭示工具性能的结构性决定因素和有效组合策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NPM生态系统已成为软件供应链攻击的主要目标，但现有检测工具在不相容的数据集上孤立评估，导致跨工具比较不可靠，需要系统性的基准评估

Method: 构建包含6,420个恶意包和7,288个良性包的数据集，标注11种行为类别和8种规避技术，评估8个工具的13个变体，结合定量评估和源代码检查

Result: GuardDog达到最佳平衡（93.32% F1）；行为链检测显著提升SAP_DT从3.2%到79.3%；大多数恶意软件无需规避；ML退化源于概念收敛而非概念漂移；策略组合可达96.08%准确率和95.79% F1

Conclusion: 工具性能由结构机制决定，行为链能有效区分恶意意图，生态系统缺乏强制预发布扫描，工具组合效果取决于互补性而非范式多样性，提供公开基准和评估框架

Abstract: The NPM ecosystem has become a primary target for software supply chain attacks, yet existing detection tools are evaluated in isolation on incompatible datasets, making cross-tool comparison unreliable. We conduct a benchmark-driven empirical analysis of NPM malware detection, building a dataset of 6,420 malicious and 7,288 benign packages annotated with 11 behavior categories and 8 evasion techniques, and evaluating 8 tools across 13 variants. Unlike prior work, we complement quantitative evaluation with source-code inspection of each tool to expose the structural mechanisms behind its performance.
  Our analysis reveals five key findings. Tool precision-recall positions are structurally determined by how each tool resolves the ambiguity between what code can do and what it intends to do, with GuardDog achieving the best balance at 93.32% F1. A single API call carries no directional intent, but a behavioral chain such as collecting environment variables, serializing, and exfiltrating disambiguates malicious purpose, raising SAP_DT detection from 3.2% to 79.3%. Most malware requires no evasion because the ecosystem lacks mandatory pre-publication scanning. ML degradation stems from concept convergence rather than concept drift: malware became simpler and statistically indistinguishable from benign code in feature space. Tool combination effectiveness is governed by complementarity minus false-positive introduction, not paradigm diversity, with strategic combinations reaching 96.08% accuracy and 95.79% F1. Our benchmark and evaluation framework are publicly available.

</details>


### [388] [Advancing Evidence-Based Social Sustainability in Software Engineering: A Research Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27735)
*Bimpe Ayoola,Anielle Andrade,Ronnie de Souza Santos,Paul Ralph*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对软件工程中的社会可持续性进行了概念梳理，提出了综合定义，并制定了在软件开发中测量和整合社会可持续性的路线图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程中的社会可持续性缺乏清晰的概念和方法论基础，在实践中常常被速度和利润所忽视，需要建立系统的理论框架来指导实践。

Method: 采用叙述性综述方法分析现有社会可持续性定义，识别关键方面（社会公平、福祉、社区凝聚力），概念性分析测量和整合挑战，提出综合定义和实施路线图。

Result: 识别了社会可持续性的三个核心方面（社会公平、福祉、社区凝聚力），分析了实践中的测量和整合挑战，提出了综合定义和具体的实施路线图。

Conclusion: 软件工程需要系统性地整合社会可持续性，提出的定义和路线图为实践提供了指导框架，有助于在软件开发中平衡技术目标与社会价值。

Abstract: Social sustainability in software development means creating and maintaining systems that promote pro-social values (e.g., human well-being, equity), both now and in the future. However, social sustainability lacks clear conceptual and methodological foundations, and often takes a back seat to speed and profit. This paper therefore reports a narrative review of existing definitions of social sustainability in software development and identifies key aspects of social sustainability including social equity, well-being, and community cohesion. Challenges around measuring and integrating social sustainability into practice are conceptually analyzed. The paper then proposes a comprehensive definition of social sustainability and outlines a roadmap for measuring and integrating social sustainability into software engineering processes.

</details>


### [389] [Needle in the Repo: A Benchmark for Maintainability in AI-Generated Repository Edits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27745)
*Haichao Zhu,Qian Zhang,Jiyuan Wang,Zhaorui Yang,Yuxin Qiu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: NITR框架评估AI编码代理在保持代码可维护性方面的表现，发现当前系统在架构层面的可维护性上表现较差，特别是依赖控制和职责分解方面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI编码代理评估主要关注行为正确性，而忽视了可维护性风险（如模块化、可测试性）。需要评估行为正确的代码编辑是否保持了可维护的结构。

Method: 提出NITR框架，将软件工程原则转化为可控的探针，嵌入小型现实多文件代码库中。每个探针针对特定可维护性维度，配合隐藏评估框架（功能测试+结构预言机）进行诊断。

Result: 评估23种编码配置（GPT、Claude、Gemini、Qwen等），平均仅解决36.2%的案例，最佳配置57.1%。架构压力最难：依赖控制4.3%，职责分解15.2%。13.3%的案例通过功能测试但违反结构约束。

Conclusion: 代码生成进展不等于可维护代码演化进展。NITR揭示了传统评估遗漏的关键失败面，当前AI编码系统在保持可维护性方面仍不稳健。

Abstract: AI coding agents can now complete complex programming tasks, but existing evaluations largely emphasize behavioral correctness and often overlook maintainability risks such as weak modularity or testability. We present Needle in the Repo (NITR), a diagnostic probe-and-oracle framework for evaluating whether behaviorally correct repository edits preserve maintainable structure. NITR distills recurring software engineering wisdom into controlled probes embedded in small, realistic multi-file codebases, each designed so that success depends primarily on one targeted maintainability dimension. Each probe is paired with a hidden evaluation harness that combines functional tests for required behavior with structural oracles that encode the targeted maintainability constraint and return interpretable diagnoses.
  Using NITR, we evaluate 23 coding configurations across GPT, Claude, Gemini, and Qwen families in both direct-inference and agent-based settings. Current AI coding systems remain far from robust: on average, configurations solve only 36.2% of cases, the best reaches 57.1%, and performance drops from 53.5% on micro cases to 20.6% on multi-step cases. The hardest pressures are architectural rather than local edits, especially dependency control (4.3%) and responsibility decomposition (15.2%). Moreover, 64/483 outcomes (13.3%) pass all functional tests yet fail the structural oracle. Under our harness, agent-mode configurations improve average performance from 28.2% to 45.0%, but do not eliminate these architectural failures. These results show that progress in code generation is not yet progress in maintainable code evolution, and that NITR exposes a critical failure surface missed by conventional evaluation.

</details>


### [390] [EffiSkill: Agent Skill Based Automated Code Efficiency Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27850)
*Zimu Wang,Yuling Shi,Mengfan Li,Zijun Liu,Jie M. Zhang,Chengcheng Wan,Xiaodong Gu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: EffiSkill是一个代码效率优化框架，通过挖掘可重用的优化技能库，让LLM代理能够进行无执行的代码优化，显著提升优化成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（一次性重写、检索示例、基于提示的搜索）未能显式提取可重用的优化知识，限制了在单个实例之外的泛化能力。需要一种能够捕获重复出现的慢到快转换模式的方法。

Method: 采用两阶段设计：第一阶段从大规模慢/快程序对中挖掘操作技能和元技能，构建技能库；第二阶段通过无执行诊断、技能检索、计划组合和候选生成，将技能库应用于未见程序，无需运行时反馈。

Result: 在EffiBench-X基准测试中，EffiSkill实现了更高的优化成功率，在不同模型和语言设置下，比最强基线提高了3.69到12.52个百分点。

Conclusion: 机制级别的技能重用为无执行代码优化提供了有用基础，生成的技能库可以作为更广泛代理工作流的可重用资源。

Abstract: Code efficiency is a fundamental aspect of software quality, yet how to harness large language models (LLMs) to optimize programs remains challenging. Prior approaches have sought for one-shot rewriting, retrieved exemplars, or prompt-based search, but they do not explicitly distill reusable optimization knowledge, which limits generalization beyond individual instances.
  In this paper, we present EffiSkill, a framework for code-efficiency optimization that builds a portable optimization toolbox for LLM-based agents. The key idea is to model recurring slow-to-fast transformations as reusable agent skills that capture both concrete transformation mechanisms and higher-level optimization strategies. EffiSkill adopts a two-stage design: Stage I mines Operator and Meta Skills from large-scale slow/fast program pairs to build a skill library; Stage II applies this library to unseen programs through execution-free diagnosis, skill retrieval, plan composition, and candidate generation, without runtime feedback.
  Results on EffiBench-X show that EffiSkill achieves higher optimization success rates, improving over the strongest baseline by 3.69 to 12.52 percentage points across model and language settings. These findings suggest that mechanism-level skill reuse provides a useful foundation for execution-free code optimization, and that the resulting skill library can serve as a reusable resource for broader agent workflows.

</details>


### [391] [Fairness Across Fields: Comparing Software Engineering and Human Sciences Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27895)
*Lucas Valenca,Ronnie de Souza Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究对比了软件工程与人文科学对公平性的不同理解，发现软件工程主要采用形式化统计方法，而人文科学强调历史背景和权力关系，建议软件工程应借鉴人文视角以更好处理技术的社会影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着数字技术在医疗、公共安全、娱乐和教育等社会领域的影响日益增强，软件工程主要通过算法公平性来处理伦理和政治问题。本研究旨在挑战软件工程公平性方法的局限性，通过分析人文科学如何概念化公平性来探索跨学科的伦理技术发展见解。

Method: 进行了两项二次研究：分析了软件工程领域的45篇关于算法公平性的文章，以及人文科学领域的25篇关于公平性的文章。通过比较这两个领域的发现，评估跨学科对伦理技术发展的见解。

Result: 分析显示，软件工程主要通过关注结果分布的形式化和统计概念来定义公平性，而人文科学则强调基于结构性不平等和权力关系的历史情境视角。两个领域在社会效益、实践建议和挑战识别方面也存在明显差异。

Conclusion: 人文科学的视角能够有意义地贡献于软件工程，通过促进超越技术方法的、情境化的公平性理解，更好地考虑技术的社会影响。

Abstract: Background. As digital technologies increasingly shape social domains such as healthcare, public safety, entertainment, and education, software engineering has engaged with ethical and political concerns primarily through the notion of algorithmic fairness. Aim. This study challenges the limits of software engineering approaches to fairness by analyzing how fairness is conceptualized in the human sciences. Methodology. We conducted two secondary studies, exploring 45 articles on algorithmic fairness in software engineering and 25 articles on fairness from the humanities, and compared their findings to assess cross-disciplinary insights for ethical technological development. Results. The analysis shows that software engineering predominantly defines fairness through formal and statistical notions focused on outcome distribution, whereas the humanities emphasize historically situated perspectives grounded in structural inequalities and power relations, with differences also evident in associated social benefits, proposed practices, and identified challenges. Conclusion. Perspectives from the human sciences can meaningfully contribute to software engineering by promoting situated understandings of fairness that move beyond technical approaches and better account for the societal impacts of technologies.

</details>


### [392] [Large Language Models in Game Development: Implications for Gameplay, Playability, and Player Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27896)
*Keeryn Johnson,Muhammad Ahmed,Charlie Lang,Sahib Thethi,Wilson Zheng,Ronnie de Souza Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM集成增加游戏可变性和个性化，但带来正确性、难度校准和结构一致性等挑战，重塑游戏工程实践。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究大型语言模型如何影响游戏开发中的游戏玩法、可玩性和玩家体验，探索生成式AI集成对游戏工程实践的影响。

Method: 采用协作自传民族志方法，分析两个嵌入LLM作为架构组件的游戏项目，通过反思性叙述和开发工件，以游戏玩法、可玩性和玩家体验为指导框架。

Result: LLM集成增加了游戏的变异性与个性化，但引入了正确性、难度校准和结构一致性方面的挑战，为游戏工程实践带来新的架构和质量考量。

Conclusion: 生成式AI集成重塑了既有的游戏概念框架，为游戏工程实践引入了新的架构设计考量与质量评估维度。

Abstract: This paper investigates how the integration of large language models influences gameplay, playability, and player experience in game development. We report a collaborative autoethnographic study of two game projects in which LLMs were embedded as architectural components. Reflective narratives and development artifacts were analyzed using gameplay, playability, and player experience as guiding constructs. The findings suggest that LLM integration increases variability and personalization while introducing challenges related to correctness, difficulty calibration, and structural coherence across these concepts. The study provides preliminary empirical insight into how generative AI integration reshapes established game constructs and introduces new architectural and quality considerations within game engineering practice.

</details>


### [393] [DAInfer+: Neurosymbolic Inference of API Specifications from Documentation via Embedding Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28060)
*Maryam Masoudian,Anshunkang Zhou,Chengpeng Wang,Charles Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DAInfer+ 使用 NLP 技术从库文档中推断 API 规范，通过神经符号优化生成数据流和别名关系规范，在 Java 库评估中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代软件系统严重依赖各种库，但理解 API 语义在静态分析中面临挑战，因为库实现复杂或代码不可用，需要从文档中推断 API 规范。

Method: 使用自然语言处理解释文档中的非正式语义信息，将规范推断转化为优化问题。研究句子嵌入模型和大型语言模型从 API 描述中推导内存操作抽象，然后使用神经符号优化生成精确的数据流和别名规范。

Result: 零样本句子嵌入模型在鲁棒性上优于少样本提示的 LLM，能更有效地捕捉细粒度语义细微差别。数据流推断达到超过 82% 召回率和 85% 精确率，别名关系达到 88% 召回率和 79% 精确率，均在几秒内完成。

Conclusion: DAInfer+ 在库感知静态分析中具有实际价值，展示了从文档中自动推断 API 规范的可行性，为静态分析工具提供了有效的规范获取方法。

Abstract: Modern software systems heavily rely on various libraries, which require understanding the API semantics in static analysis. However, summarizing API semantics remains challenging due to complex implementations or unavailable library code. This paper presents DAInfer+, a novel approach for inferring API specifications from library documentation. We employ Natural Language Processing (NLP) to interpret informal semantic information provided by the documentation, which enables us to reduce the specification inference to an optimization problem. Specifically, we investigate the effectiveness of sentence embedding models and Large Language Models (LLMs) in deriving memory operation abstractions from API descriptions. These abstractions are used to retrieve data-flow and aliasing relations to generate comprehensive API specifications. To solve the optimization problem efficiently, we propose neurosymbolic optimization, yielding precise data-flow and aliasing specifications. Our evaluation of popular Java libraries shows that zero-shot sentence embedding models outperform few-shot prompted LLMs in robustness, capturing fine-grained semantic nuances more effectively. While our initial attempts using two-stage LLM prompting yielded promising results, we found that the embedding-based approach proved superior. Specifically, these models achieve over 82% recall and 85% precision for data-flow inference and 88% recall and 79% precision for alias relations, all within seconds. These results demonstrate the practical value of DAInfer+ in library-aware static analysis.

</details>


### [394] [Compressing Code Context for LLM-based Issue Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28119)
*Haoxiang Jia,Earl T. Barr,Sergey Mechtaev*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWEzze框架通过代码蒸馏和轻量模型学习，在保持修复能力的同时将代码上下文压缩约6倍，提升问题解决率5-9%，减少51-71%的token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM处理GitHub问题时面临两大挑战：处理大规模代码上下文的过高成本，以及噪声干扰导致修复效果降低。现有压缩技术要么破坏代码语义完整性，要么缺乏对代码结构和任务上下文的理解。

Method: 提出包含两个组件的框架：1) Oracle-guided Code Distillation (OCD)：结合遗传搜索和增量调试，将代码上下文蒸馏到最小充分子序列；2) SWEzze：使用蒸馏数据微调的轻量模型，在推理时压缩代码上下文，过滤噪声同时保留修复所需成分。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified基准测试中，SWEzze在三个前沿LLM上保持约6倍的稳定压缩率，相比未压缩设置减少51.8%-71.3%的token预算，提升问题解决率5.0%-9.2%，在效果、压缩比和延迟方面达到最佳平衡。

Conclusion: SWEzze框架有效解决了代码上下文压缩的难题，通过保留修复所需的最小充分代码片段，显著降低了计算成本并提升了LLM修复GitHub问题的效果。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are now capable of resolving real-world GitHub issues. However, current approaches overapproximate the code context and suffer from two compounding problems: the prohibitive cost of processing massive inputs, and low effectiveness as noise floods the context window and distracts the model from the bug-fixing signal. Existing compression techniques fail to resolve this tension: generic compressors compromise the semantic integrity of code, while code-specific tools lack awareness of code structure and task context to preserve essential patch ingredients. To address this, we propose a novel framework consisting of two components. First, Oracle-guided Code Distillation (OCD), a context distillation algorithm that combines genetic search and delta debugging to systematically reduce code contexts to their minimal sufficient subsequence - retaining only the ingredients required for a successful fix. We use this distilled data to fine-tune SWEzze, a lightweight model that learns to compress code context at inference time, filtering noise and combating distraction while preserving fix ingredients. Evaluated on SWE-bench Verified across three frontier LLMs, SWEzze maintains a stable compression rate of about 6 times across models, reduces the total token budget by 51.8%-71.3% relative to the uncompressed setting, improves issue resolution rates by 5.0%-9.2%, and delivers the best overall balance among effectiveness, compression ratio, and latency compared with state-of-the-art context compression baselines.

</details>


### [395] [Voice-Controlled Scratch for Children with (Motor) Disabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28246)
*Elias Goller,Gordon Fraser,Isabella Graßl*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MeowCrophone是一个语音控制系统，通过多模态语音界面让有运动障碍的用户能够编辑Scratch代码，使用数字覆盖和标签阅读绕过物理输入限制，并通过多阶段匹配管道显著提高语音识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的无障碍解决方案主要关注视觉障碍，忽略了有运动障碍的用户在鼠标拖拽界面中面临的物理交互障碍。Scratch等基于块的编程环境对运动障碍用户存在访问障碍。

Method: 开发MeowCrophone系统，采用多模态语音用户界面，使用数字覆盖和标签阅读技术。为应对课堂环境中的不完美语音识别和构音障碍问题，设计了基于正则表达式、语音匹配和自定义语法的多阶段匹配管道。

Result: 评估显示，自由语音识别系统的基础成功率仅为46.4%，而MeowCrophone的管道将整体成功率提升至82.8%，简单命令的准确率达到96.9%。

Conclusion: 研究表明，鲁棒的语音控制可以使Scratch对视觉辅助不足的用户变得可访问，为有运动障碍的用户提供了有效的编程交互解决方案。

Abstract: Block-based programming environments like Scratch have become widely adopted in Computer Science Education, but the mouse-based drag-and-drop interface can challenge users with disabilities. While prior work has provided solutions supporting children with visual impairment, these solutions tend to focus on making content perceivable and do not address the physical interaction barriers faced by users with motor disabilities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MeowCrophone, an approach that uses voice control to allow editing code in Scratch. MeowCrophone supports clicking elements, placing blocks, and navigating the workspace via a multi-modal voice user interface that uses numerical overlays and label reading to bypass physical input entirely. As imperfect speech recognition is common in classrooms and for children with dysarthria, MeowCrophone employs a multi-stage matching pipeline using regular expressions, phonetic matching, and a custom grammar. Evaluation shows that while free speech recognition systems achieved a baseline success rate of only 46.4%, MeowCrophone's pipeline improved results to 82.8% overall, with simple commands reaching 96.9% accuracy. This demonstrates that robust voice control can make Scratch accessible to users for whom visual aids are insufficient.

</details>


### [396] [Crossing the NL/PL Divide: Information Flow Analysis Across the NL/PL Boundary in LLM-Integrated Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28345)
*Zihao Xu,Xiao Cheng,Ruijie Meng,Yuekang Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了首个跨越自然语言/编程语言边界的信息流分析方法，通过24个标签的分类体系来量化LLM API调用的信息传播特性，并应用于污点分析和程序切片等场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM API调用已成为普遍的程序构造，但它们在自然语言提示和程序代码之间创建了一个现有程序分析无法跨越的边界。传统的污点分析、程序切片、依赖分析等都需要被调用函数的数据流摘要，而LLM调用缺乏这样的摘要，导致所有相关分析在NL/PL边界处失效。

Method: 基于定量信息流理论，提出了一个包含24个标签的分类体系，沿两个正交维度：信息保留级别（从词汇保留到完全阻断）和输出模态（自然语言、结构化格式、可执行工件）。对来自4,154个真实Python文件的9,083个占位符-输出对进行标注，并验证了可靠性（Cohen's κ=0.82）。

Result: 分类体系在应用中表现出色：1）两阶段污点传播管道结合基于分类的过滤和LLM验证，在353个专家标注对上达到F1=0.923；2）基于分类的后向切片在包含非传播占位符的文件中将切片大小平均减少15%。分析显示四个阻断标签几乎涵盖了所有非传播情况。

Conclusion: 该研究首次实现了跨越NL/PL边界的信息流分析，提出的分类体系为工具构建者提供了可操作的过滤标准，能够有效支持污点分析、程序切片等传统程序分析在LLM环境中的应用。

Abstract: LLM API calls are becoming a ubiquitous program construct, yet they create a boundary that no existing program analysis can cross: runtime values enter a natural-language prompt, undergo opaque processing inside the LLM, and re-emerge as code, SQL, JSON, or text that the program consumes. Every analysis that tracks data across function boundaries, including taint analysis, program slicing, dependency analysis, and change-impact analysis, relies on dataflow summaries of callee behavior. LLM calls have no such summaries, breaking all of these analyses at what we call the NL/PL boundary.
  We present the first information flow method to bridge this boundary. Grounded in quantitative information flow theory, our taxonomy defines 24 labels along two orthogonal dimensions: information preservation level (from lexically preserved to fully blocked) and output modality (natural language, structured format, executable artifact). We label 9,083 placeholder-output pairs from 4,154 real-world Python files and validate reliability with Cohen's $κ= 0.82$ and near-complete coverage (0.01\% unclassifiable). We demonstrate the taxonomy's utility on two downstream applications: (1)~a two-stage taint propagation pipeline combining taxonomy-based filtering with LLM verification achieves $F_1 = 0.923$ on 353 expert-annotated pairs, with cross-language validation on six real-world OpenClaw prompt injection cases further confirming effectiveness; (2)~taxonomy-informed backward slicing reduces slice size by a mean of 15\% in files containing non-propagating placeholders. Per-label analysis reveals that four blocked labels account for nearly all non-propagating cases, providing actionable filtering criteria for tool builders.

</details>


### [397] [Detecting and Mitigating Flakiness in REST API Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28452)
*Man Zhang,Chongyang Shen,Andrea Arcuri,Tao Yue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究REST API测试中的flakiness问题，提出FlakyCatch工具来检测和缓解由EvoMaster等模糊测试工具生成的测试中的不稳定问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注单元测试和小规模集成测试的flakiness问题，而系统级测试（如REST API）中的flakiness研究相对不足。虽然已有大量文献研究REST API模糊测试，但很少关注在此背景下检测和缓解flakiness的负面影响。

Method: 使用流行的REST API模糊测试工具EvoMaster，对36个REST API进行实证研究，分析近3000个失败测试以分类和分析flakiness来源。基于此理解，提出FlakyCatch工具来检测和缓解REST API中的flakiness问题。

Result: FlakyCatch能有效检测和处理由白盒和黑盒模糊测试工具生成的测试中的flakiness问题。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了REST API测试flakiness研究的空白，提出的FlakyCatch工具为解决REST API模糊测试中的不稳定问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Test flakiness is a common problem in industry, which hinders the reliability of automated build and testing workflows. Most existing research on test flakiness has primarily focused on unit and small-scale integration tests. In contrast, flakiness in system-level testing such as REST APIs are comparatively under-explored. A large body of literature has been dedicated to the topic of fuzzing REST APIs, whereas relatively little attention has been paid to detecting and possibly mitigating negative effects of flakiness in this context. To fill this major gap, in this paper, we study the flakiness of tests generated by one of the popularly applied REST API fuzzer in the literature, namely EvoMaster, conduct empirical studies with a corpus of 36 REST APIs to understand flakiness of REST APIs. Based on the results of the empirical studies, we categorize and analyze flakiness sources by inspecting near 3000 failing tests. Based on the understanding, we propose FlakyCatch to detect and mitigate flakiness in REST APIs and empirically evaluate its performance. Results show that FlakyCatch is effective in detecting and handling flakiness in tests generated by white-box and black-box fuzzers.

</details>


### [398] [Debt Behind the AI Boom: A Large-Scale Empirical Study of AI-Generated Code in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28592)
*Yue Liu,Ratnadira Widyasari,Yanjie Zhao,Ivana Clairine Irsan,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI代码助手在实际项目中引入大量技术债务，24.2%的问题长期存在，影响软件维护


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然AI代码助手在软件开发中广泛应用，但对其在实际生产环境中引入的代码质量问题及其长期影响了解不足，需要研究AI生成代码是否会导致技术债务积累

Method: 大规模实证研究：构建包含304,362个已验证AI提交的数据集，覆盖6,275个GitHub仓库和5个主流AI代码助手。对每个提交运行静态分析，追踪AI引入的代码异味、bug和安全问题的生命周期

Result: 识别出484,606个不同问题，代码异味占89.1%；超过15%的AI提交至少引入一个问题；24.2%的AI引入问题在最新仓库版本中仍然存在

Conclusion: AI生成代码会给实际软件项目带来长期维护成本，突显了在AI辅助开发中需要更强的质量保证措施

Abstract: AI coding assistants are now widely used in software development. Software developers increasingly integrate AI-generated code into their codebases to improve productivity. Prior studies have shown that AI-generated code may contain code quality issues under controlled settings. However, we still know little about the real-world impact of AI-generated code on software quality and maintenance after it is introduced into production repositories. In other words, it remains unclear whether such issues are quickly fixed or persist and accumulate over time as technical debt. In this paper, we conduct a large-scale empirical study on the technical debt introduced by AI coding assistants in the wild. To achieve that, we built a dataset of 304,362 verified AI-authored commits from 6,275 GitHub repositories, covering five widely used AI coding assistants. For each commit, we run static analysis before and after the change to precisely attribute which code smells, bugs, and security issues the AI introduced. We then track each introduced issue from the introducing commit to the latest repository revision to study its lifecycle. Our results show that we identified 484,606 distinct issues, and that code smells are by far the most common type, accounting for 89.1% of all issues. We also find that more than 15% of commits from every AI coding assistant introduce at least one issue, although the rates vary across tools. More importantly, 24.2% of tracked AI-introduced issues still survive at the latest revision of the repository. These findings show that AI-generated code can introduce long-term maintenance costs into real software projects and highlight the need for stronger quality assurance in AI-assisted development.

</details>


### [399] [Enhancing User-Feedback Driven Requirements Prioritization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28677)
*Aurek Chattopadhyay,Nan Niu,Hui Liu,Jianzhang Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过将需求从独立实体转向相互关联，利用用户反馈将需求分组为主题一致的簇，自动生成额外的"requires"关系，从而增强基于搜索的需求优先级排序方法，实验证明优于现有ReFeed方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需求优先级排序是一个NP难问题，现有ReFeed方法通过用户反馈量化属性推断需求优先级，但将需求视为独立实体。本文旨在通过需求间的相互关联性来增强优先级排序，并探索这种关联性对基于搜索的解决方案的附加价值。

Method: 利用移动应用商店的用户反馈，将需求分组为主题一致的簇，从而自动生成候选需求间的"requires"关系。将这些"requires"关系对集成到基于搜索的软件工程解决方案中，增强需求优先级排序。

Result: 在4个真实软件应用的94个需求优先级排序实例上的实验表明，该方法优于ReFeed。同时展示了需求间的相互关联性如何改进基于搜索的解决方案。

Conclusion: 需求间的相互关联性改善了基于用户反馈的需求优先级排序，有助于发现候选需求中额外的"requires"关系，并增强了基于搜索的发布规划。

Abstract: Context: Requirements prioritization is a challenging problem that is aimed to deliver the most suitable subset from a pool of candidate requirements. The problem is NP-hard when formulated as an optimization problem. Feedback from end users can offer valuable support for software evolution, and ReFeed represents a state-of-the-art in automatically inferring a requirement's priority via quantifiable properties of the feedback messages associated with a candidate requirement. Objectives: In this paper, we enhance ReFeed by shifting the focus of prioritization from treating requirements as independent entities toward interconnecting them. Additionally, we explore if interconnecting requirements provides additional value for search-based solutions. Methods: We leverage user feedback from mobile app store to group requirements into topically coherent clusters. Such interconnectedness, in turn, helps to auto-generate additional "requires" relations in candidate requirements. These "requires" pairs are then integrated into a search-based software engineering solution. Results: The experiments on 94 requirements prioritization instances from four real-world software applications show that our enhancement outperforms ReFeed. In addition, we illustrate how incorporating interconnectedness among requirements improves search-based solutions. Conclusion: Our findings show that requirements interconnectedness improves user feedback driven requirements prioritization, helps uncover additional "requires" relations in candidate requirements, and also strengthens search-based release planning.

</details>


### [400] [C2RustXW: Program-Structure-Aware C-to-Rust Translation via Program Analysis and LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28686)
*Yanyan Yan,Yang Feng,Jiangshan Liu,Di Liu,Zixi Liu,Hao Teng,Baowen Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Tool 是一个结合程序分析和大型语言模型的C到Rust翻译方法，通过提取多层次程序结构指导翻译和修复，实现高语法正确性和语义正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于规则的C到Rust翻译工具（如ctorust）生成的代码冗长、不符合Rust习惯，保留了不安全的C语义，限制了可读性、可维护性和实际采用。手动后处理劳动密集且难以产生高质量Rust代码，成为大规模迁移的主要障碍。

Method: Tool提取多层次程序结构（全局符号、函数依赖、控制流和数据流信息），编码为结构化文本表示注入LLM提示中指导翻译和修复。采用依赖感知翻译和多阶段修复管道，结合基于规则和结构引导的LLM技术确保语法正确性。对于语义正确性，结合基于执行的验证和结构引导推理来定位和修复行为不一致。

Result: 在CodeNet上实现100%语法正确性，在GitHub上达到97.78%。显著减少代码大小（最高43.70%）和不安全使用（降至5.75%）。在项目级别实现完美语法正确性和平均78.87%的语义正确性。

Conclusion: Tool通过程序结构感知的C到Rust翻译方法，结合程序分析和LLM，有效解决了现有翻译工具的局限性，为实际和可扩展的C到Rust迁移提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The growing adoption of Rust for its memory safety and performance has increased the demand for effective migration of legacy C codebases. However, existing rule-based translators (e.g., \ctorust) often generate verbose, non-idiomatic code that preserves unsafe C semantics, limiting readability, maintainability, and practical adoption. Moreover, manual post-processing of such outputs is labor-intensive and rarely yields high-quality Rust code, posing a significant barrier to large-scale migration. To address these limitations, we present \tool, a program-structure-aware C-to-Rust translation approach that integrates program analysis with Large Language Models (LLMs). \tool extracts the multi-level program structure, including global symbols, function dependencies, and control- and data-flow information, and encodes these as structured textual representations injected into LLM prompts to guide translation and repair. Based on this design, \tool performs dependency-aware translation and adopts a multi-stage repair pipeline that combines rule-based and structure-guided LLM-based techniques to ensure syntactic correctness. For semantic correctness, \tool further integrates execution-based validation with structure-guided reasoning to localize and repair behavioral inconsistencies. Experimental results show that \tool achieves 100\% syntactic correctness on CodeNet and 97.78\% on GitHub, while significantly reducing code size (up to 43.70\%) and unsafe usage (to 5.75\%). At the project level, \tool achieves perfect syntactic correctness and an average semantic correctness of 78.87\%, demonstrating its effectiveness for practical and scalable C-to-Rust migration.

</details>


### [401] [SAGAI-MID: A Generative AI-Driven Middleware for Dynamic Runtime Interoperability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28731)
*Oliver Aleksander Larsen,Mahyar T. Moghaddam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SAGAI-MID是一个基于FastAPI的中间件，使用LLM在运行时动态检测和解决模式不匹配问题，通过五层管道实现，在10个互操作性场景中达到0.90 pass@1准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代分布式系统集成了异构服务、不同版本的REST API、GraphQL端点和具有专有负载的IoT设备，这些系统存在持续的模式不匹配问题。传统的静态适配器需要为每个模式对手动编码，无法在运行时处理新的组合。

Method: 提出SAGAI-MID中间件，采用五层管道：混合检测（结构差异+LLM语义分析）、双重解决策略（每请求LLM转换和LLM生成的可重用适配器代码）以及三层安全堆栈（验证、集成投票、基于规则的备用方案）。架构基于Bass等人的互操作性策略，将其从设计时工件转化为运行时能力。

Result: 在10个互操作性场景（REST版本迁移、IoT到分析桥接、GraphQL协议转换）中评估，使用两个提供商的六个LLM。最佳配置达到0.90 pass@1准确率。CODEGEN策略始终优于DIRECT（0.83 vs 0.77平均pass@1）。成本在不同模型间差异超过30倍，但最准确的模型也是最便宜的。

Conclusion: SAGAI-MID展示了LLM作为运行时架构组件在解决模式不匹配问题中的有效性，为软件架构师采用LLM作为运行时架构组件提供了启示。

Abstract: Modern distributed systems integrate heterogeneous services, REST APIs with different schema versions, GraphQL endpoints, and IoT devices with proprietary payloads that suffer from persistent schema mismatches. Traditional static adapters require manual coding for every schema pair and cannot handle novel combinations at runtime. We present SAGAI-MID, a FastAPI-based middleware that uses large language models (LLMs) to dynamically detect and resolve schema mismatches at runtime. The system employs a five-layer pipeline: hybrid detection (structural diff plus LLM semantic analysis), dual resolution strategies (per-request LLM transformation and LLM-generated reusable adapter code), and a three-tier safeguard stack (validation, ensemble voting, rule-based fallback). We frame the architecture through Bass et al.'s interoperability tactics, transforming them from design-time artifacts into runtime capabilities. We evaluate SAGAI-MID on 10 interoperability scenarios spanning REST version migration, IoT-to-analytics bridging, and GraphQL protocol conversion across six LLMs from two providers. The best-performing configuration achieves 0.90 pass@1 accuracy. The CODEGEN strategy consistently outperforms DIRECT (0.83 vs 0.77 mean pass@1), while cost varies by over 30x across models with no proportional accuracy gain; the most accurate model is also the cheapest. We discuss implications for software architects adopting LLMs as runtime architectural components.

</details>


### [402] [RAD-AI: Rethinking Architecture Documentation for AI-Augmented Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28735)
*Oliver Aleksander Larsen,Mahyar T. Moghaddam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: RAD-AI：一个向后兼容的架构文档框架，扩展arc42和C4模型以支持AI系统，并提供欧盟AI法案附件IV的合规映射


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有架构文档框架（arc42和C4模型）为确定性软件设计，无法捕捉AI系统的概率行为、数据依赖演化和双重ML/软件生命周期。欧盟AI法案要求高风险系统提供技术文档，但现有框架无法提供结构化支持。

Method: 提出RAD-AI框架，向后兼容地扩展arc42（增加8个AI特定部分）和C4模型（增加3个图表扩展），并提供系统化的欧盟AI法案附件IV合规映射。

Result: 评估显示RAD-AI将附件IV可寻址性从约36%提高到93%（平均评分）。在Uber Michelangelo和Netflix Metaflow两个生产AI平台上的比较分析捕获了8个标准框架遗漏的AI特定问题。智能移动生态系统案例研究揭示了生态系统级问题。

Conclusion: RAD-AI有效填补了AI增强生态系统架构文档的空白，显著提高了欧盟AI法案合规性，并揭示了标准框架无法捕捉的AI特定和生态系统级问题。

Abstract: AI-augmented ecosystems (interconnected systems where multiple AI components interact through shared data and infrastructure) are becoming the architectural norm for smart cities, autonomous fleets, and intelligent platforms. Yet the architecture documentation frameworks practitioners rely on, arc42 and the C4 model, were designed for deterministic software and cannot capture probabilistic behavior, data-dependent evolution, or dual ML/software lifecycles. This gap carries regulatory consequence: the EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) mandates technical documentation through Annex IV that no existing framework provides structured support for, with enforcement for high-risk systems beginning August 2, 2026. We present RAD-AI, a backward-compatible extension framework that augments arc42 with eight AI-specific sections and C4 with three diagram extensions, complemented by a systematic EU AI Act Annex IV compliance mapping. A regulatory coverage assessment with six experienced software-architecture practitioners provides preliminary evidence that RAD-AI increases Annex IV addressability from approximately 36% to 93% (mean rating) and demonstrates substantial improvement over existing frameworks. Comparative analysis on two production AI platforms (Uber Michelangelo, Netflix Metaflow) captures eight additional AI-specific concerns missed by standard frameworks and demonstrates that documentation deficiencies are structural rather than domain-specific. An illustrative smart mobility ecosystem case study reveals ecosystem-level concerns, including cascading drift and differentiated compliance obligations, that are invisible under standard notation.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [403] [DRASTIC: A Dynamic Resource Allocation Framework over 6G Network Slicing in Task-aware Closed-Loop Tactile Internet Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27364)
*Narges Golmohammadi,Madan Mohan Rayguru,Sabur Baidya*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出名为DRASTIC的动态资源分配框架，用于切片网络中同时支持eMBB和HRLLC用户，通过强化学习实现队列稳定和延迟保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在支持增强移动宽带(eMBB)和高可靠低延迟通信(HRLLC)的切片网络中，需要动态资源分配框架来同时满足吞吐量和延迟要求，特别是在任务感知的闭环触觉互联网应用中。

Method: 提出DRASTIC框架，采用Lyapunov引导的优势演员-评论家强化学习技术，包含开环eMBB队列和闭环HRLLC队列，通过任务执行相关的灵巧度指数调整到达率，使用拉格朗日松弛将概率延迟约束纳入目标函数。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该框架能够满足多样化的服务质量要求，在动态无线和机器人任务变化条件下保持队列稳定，并且性能优于其他方法。

Conclusion: DRASTIC框架通过强化学习驱动的动态资源分配，成功解决了切片网络中eMBB和HRLLC用户的资源优化问题，实现了队列稳定和延迟保障的平衡。

Abstract: This work proposes a novel learning driven bandwidth optimization framework called DRASTIC (Dynamic Resource Allocation for Slicing in Task aware Closed loop tactile Internet applications). The proposed framework dynamically allocates resources among network slices supporting both enhanced Mobile Broadband (eMBB) and high reliable low latency communication (HRLLC) users. The algorithm ensures queue stability and meets delay targets with high probability under a Markov-modulated Poisson traffic, exploiting a Lyapunov guided advantage actor critic reinforcement learning technique. The proposed network model includes an open-loop eMBB queue whose arrival and departure are mainly driven by throughput demand, as well as a closed loop HRLLC queue that captures feedback and task execution effects. A task execution dependent dexterity index adjusts the effective arrival rate, creating a feedback aware interaction between the network and the task. A probabilistic delay constraint is incorporated into the objective via Lagrangian relaxation, yielding a min_max optimization framework that enforces latency guarantees while maximizing throughput for both types of users. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework meets diverse Quality of Service (QoS) requirements, maintains queue stability under dynamic wireless and robotic task variation conditions, and outperforms other approaches.

</details>


### [404] [Serverless5GC: Private 5G Core Deployment via a Procedure-as-a-Function Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27618)
*Hai Dinh-Tuan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: Serverless5GC将5G核心网控制面功能映射为无服务器函数调用，实现按需伸缩至零，在保持标准接口兼容性的同时显著提升资源效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统开源5G核心网实现采用常驻进程运行网络功能，即使在空闲时也消耗资源，这在流量稀疏的私有和边缘部署中效率低下。需要一种既能保持3GPP标准接口兼容性，又能实现按需伸缩至零的解决方案。

Method: 将12个3GPP Release 15-17网络功能分解为31个无服务器过程，通过SCTP/NGAP代理桥接未修改的RAN设备与基于HTTP的无服务器后端。每个3GPP控制面过程映射为独立的Function-as-a-Service调用。

Result: 在五种流量场景（空闲到20注册/秒突发）下，Serverless5GC实现中位注册延迟406-522ms，与C语言实现的Open5GS基线（403-606ms）相当，3000次注册成功率100%。资源时间成本模型显示，在集群负载低于0.65占空比、两个以上租户共享平台或托管FaaS平台上，无服务器部署更经济。

Conclusion: Serverless5GC证明了将5G核心网控制面功能无服务器化的可行性，在保持性能的同时显著提升资源效率，特别适合流量稀疏的私有和边缘部署场景。

Abstract: Open-source 5G core implementations deploy network functions as always-on processes that consume resources even when idle. This inefficiency is most acute in private and edge deployments with sporadic traffic. Serverless5GC is an architecture that maps each 3GPP control-plane procedure to an independent Function-as-a-Service invocation, allowing scale-to-zero operation without modifying the standard N2 interface. The system decomposes 12~network functions (Release~15-17) into 31~serverless procedures, fronted by an SCTP/NGAP proxy that bridges unmodified RAN equipment to an HTTP-based serverless backend. Evaluation against Open5GS and free5GC across five traffic scenarios (idle to 20~registrations/s burst) shows that Serverless5GC achieves median registration latency of 406-522ms, on par with the C-based Open5GS baseline (403-606ms), while maintaining 100% success across 3,000 registrations. A resource-time cost model shows that the serverless deployment (0.002GB-seconds per registration) is cheaper than the always-on baseline when the cluster operates below a 0.65 duty cycle, when two or more tenants share the platform, or on managed FaaS platforms up to 609reg/s. Under worst-case cold-start conditions where all 31 function pods are evicted simultaneously, the system sustains zero failures and converges to warm-start latency within 4-5 seconds.

</details>


### [405] [Fronthaul Network Planning for Hierarchical and Radio-Stripes-Enabled CF-mMIMO in O-RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27853)
*Anas S. Mohammed,Krishnendu S. Tharakan,Hussein A. Ammar,Hesham ElSawy,Hossam S. Hassanein*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出两层级优化框架用于超密集网络混合前传规划，结合光纤、毫米波和自由空间光学技术，在O-RAN架构下实现成本效益和容量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超密集网络特别是无蜂窝大规模MIMO的部署主要受限于昂贵且容量有限的前传链路，需要成本效益高的混合前传规划方案。

Method: 提出两层级优化框架：第一层采用近优前传关联与配置算法，第二层使用整数线性规划，整合光纤、毫米波和自由空间光学技术，支持多种功能分割选项和去中心化处理级别。

Result: 相比传统全光纤前传网络，该框架实现更好的成本效益和更高容量；光纤在高度去中心化部署中占主导，毫米波适合中等集中化场景，自由空间光学可填补部署空白；FS7.2x始终优于FS8。

Conclusion: 混合前传有效规划对超密集网络至关重要，可最小化基础设施冗余，确保可扩展性以满足当前和未来流量需求，FS7.2x是O-RAN的首选功能分割选项。

Abstract: The deployment of ultra-dense networks (UDNs), particularly cell-free massive MIMO (CF-mMIMO), is mainly hindered by costly and capacity-limited fronthaul links. This work proposes a two-tiered optimization framework for cost-effective hybrid fronthaul planning, comprising a Near-Optimal Fronthaul Association and Configuration (NOFAC) algorithm in the first tier and an Integer Linear Program (ILP) in the second, integrating fiber optics, millimeter-wave (mmWave), and free-space optics (FSO) technologies. The proposed framework accommodates various functional split (FS) options (7.2x and 8), decentralized processing levels, and network configurations. We introduce the hierarchical scheme (HS) as a resilient, cost-effective fronthaul solution for CF-mMIMO and compare its performance with radio-stripes (RS)-enabled CF-mMIMO, validating both across diverse dense topologies within the open radio access network (O-RAN) architecture. Results show that the proposed framework achieves better cost-efficiency and higher capacity compared to traditional benchmark schemes such as all-fiber fronthaul network. Our key findings reveal fiber dominance in highly decentralized deployments, mmWave suitability in moderately centralized scenarios, and FSO complements both by bridging deployment gaps. Additionally, FS7.2x consistently outperforms FS8, offering greater capacity at lower cost, affirming its role as the preferred O-RAN functional split. Most importantly, our study underscores the importance of hybrid fronthaul effective planning for UDNs in minimizing infrastructural redundancy, and ensuring scalability to meet current and future traffic demands.

</details>


### [406] [Energy Efficient Orchestration in Multiple-Access Vehicular Aerial-Terrestrial 6G Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27870)
*Mohammad Farhoudi,Hamidreza Mazandarani,Masoud Shokrnezhad,Tarik Taleb,Ignacio Lacalle*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一种用于无人机辅助6G空天地网络的创新服务编排框架，通过分层深度强化学习算法优化无人机轨迹规划、多址接入控制和服务部署，实现高能效、低延迟的车载服务覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动驾驶系统和连接技术的发展，车载应用和服务的激增对带宽分配、服务质量参数和能效提出了更高要求，特别是在高度动态的车载环境中。现有服务编排方法难以满足这些复杂需求，需要范式转变来实现无缝、稳健的服务交付。

Method: 提出一个综合框架，协同整合无人机轨迹规划、多址接入控制和服务部署。首先建立非线性规划模型来形式化优化问题，然后采用分层深度强化学习算法动态预测服务请求、用户移动性和信道条件，解决异构网络中的干扰、资源稀缺和移动性挑战。

Result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的框架在请求接受率、能效和延迟最小化方面优于现有最先进解决方案，展示了其支持下一代车载网络高需求的能力。

Conclusion: 该研究为无人机辅助6G空天地网络中的服务编排提供了一个有效的解决方案，通过分层深度强化学习方法实现了能效和低延迟的平衡，有望支持未来车载网络的高要求服务。

Abstract: The proliferation of users, devices, and novel vehicular applications - propelled by advancements in autonomous systems and connected technologies - is precipitating an unprecedented surge in novel services. These emerging services require substantial bandwidth allocation, adherence to stringent Quality of Service (QoS) parameters, and energy-efficient implementations, particularly within highly dynamic vehicular environments. The complexity of these requirements necessitates a fundamental paradigm shift in service orchestration methodologies to facilitate seamless and robust service delivery. This paper addresses this challenge by presenting a novel framework for service orchestration in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV)-assisted 6G aerial-terrestrial networks. The proposed framework synergistically integrates UAV trajectory planning, Multiple-Access Control (MAC), and service placement to facilitate energy-efficient service coverage while maintaining ultra-low latency communication for vehicular user service requests. We first present a non-linear programming model that formulates the optimization problem. Next, to address the problem, we employ a Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning (HDRL) algorithm that dynamically predicts service requests, user mobility, and channel conditions, addressing the challenges of interference, resource scarcity, and mobility in heterogeneous networks. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in request acceptance, energy efficiency, and latency minimization, showcasing its potential to support the high demands of next-generation vehicular networks.

</details>


### [407] [Adaptive Multi-Dimensional Coordinated Comprehensive Routing Scheme for IoV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27939)
*Ruixing Ren,Minqi Tao,Junhui Zhao,Qiuping Li,Xiaoke Sun*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一种面向车联网的自适应多维协调综合路由方案，通过构建完整的系统模型、定义综合路由度量、设计智能传输切换机制，显著提升路由可靠性、实时性和传输效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车联网中节点高速移动和拓扑动态变化给路由协议设计带来巨大挑战，现有方案存在适应性不足、缺乏全局考虑等问题，难以在路由可靠性、实时性和传输效率之间实现全局最优平衡。

Method: 1) 构建包含网络拓扑、通信链路、分层拥塞和传输延迟的完整车联网系统模型，将路由问题抽象为多约束单目标优化模型，定义集成链路可靠性、节点本地负载、网络全局拥塞和链路稳定性的单跳链路综合路由度量；2) 设计智能传输切换机制：通过连通性和渐进性双重标准筛选候选节点，引入主备路径双重决策和阈值切换策略避免链路中断和拥塞，构建自适应更新函数动态调整权重系数和切换阈值以适应网络状态变化。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该方案能有效适应车联网的高动态拓扑和网络拥塞特性，在路由中断次数、数据包投递率和端到端延迟等关键指标上表现优异，综合性能显著优于传统路由方案。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应多维协调综合路由方案通过系统建模、综合度量定义和智能切换机制，成功解决了车联网路由中的适应性和全局优化问题，为高动态车联网环境提供了有效的路由解决方案。

Abstract: The characteristics of high-speed node movement and dynamic topology changes pose great challenges to the design of internet of vehicles (IoV) routing protocols. Existing schemes suffer from common problems such as insufficient adaptability and lack of global consideration, making it difficult to achieve a globally optimal balance between routing reliability, real-time performance and transmission efficiency. This paper proposes an adaptive multi-dimensional coordinated comprehensive routing scheme for IoV environments. A complete IoV system model including network topology, communication links, hierarchical congestion and transmission delay is first constructed, the routing problem is abstracted into a single-objective optimization model with multiple constraints, and a single-hop link comprehensive routing metric integrating link reliability, node local load, network global congestion and link stability is defined. Second, an intelligent transmission switching mechanism is designed: candidate nodes are screened through dual criteria of connectivity and progressiveness, a dual decision-making of primary and backup paths and a threshold switching strategy are introduced to avoid link interruption and congestion, and an adaptive update function is constructed to dynamically adjust weight coefficients and switching thresholds to adapt to changes in network status. Simulation results show that the proposed scheme can effectively adapt to the high dynamic topology and network congestion characteristics of IoV, perform excellently in key indicators such as routing interruption times, packet delivery rate and end-to-end delay, and its comprehensive performance is significantly superior to traditional routing schemes.

</details>


### [408] [YUHENG-OS: A Cloud-Native Space Cluster Operating System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27946)
*Jin Zhang,Jiachen Sun,Kai Liu,Linling Kuang,Jianhua Lu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: YUHENG-OS是一个专为云原生空间集群设计的操作系统，解决了空间计算资源碎片化和异构性问题，相比Kubernetes等地面系统将任务完成率提升高达98%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着星载计算和通信能力的发展，云原生空间集群成为趋势，但地面成熟的云原生集群操作系统无法直接移植到空间环境，因为星载计算资源碎片化和卫星移动性给资源感知和编排带来了巨大挑战。

Method: 提出YUHENG-OS系统，采用四层架构和三项关键技术：1) 空间任务异构资源需求建模；2) 网络约束下的碎片化异构资源感知；3) 时间依赖约束下的差异化任务与多维异构资源匹配。

Result: 相比以Kubernetes为代表的典型地面云原生集群操作系统，YUHENG-OS实现了显著更高的任务完成率，提升高达98%，主要归因于其将资源感知延迟降低了71%。

Conclusion: YUHENG-OS通过统一的异构星载基础设施抽象、感知和编排，实现了跨分布式卫星的集群范围任务部署和调度，有效解决了云原生空间集群的资源管理挑战。

Abstract: As industry and academia continue to advance spaceborne computing and communication capabilities, the formation of cloud-native space clusters (CNSCs) has become an increasingly evident trend. This evolution progressively exposes the resource management challenges associated with coordinating fragmented and heterogeneous onboard resources while supporting large-scale and diverse space applications. However, directly transplanting mature terrestrial cloud-native cluster operating system paradigms into space is ineffective due to the fragmentation of spaceborne computing resources and satellite mobility, which collectively impose substantial challenges on resource awareness and orchestration. This article presents YUHENG-OS, a cloud-native space cluster operating system tailored for CNSCs. YUHENG-OS provides unified abstraction, awareness, and orchestration of heterogeneous spaceborne infrastructure, enabling cluster-wide task deployment and scheduling across distributed satellites. We introduce a four-layer system architecture and three key enabling technologies: modeling of heterogeneous resource demands for space tasks, fragmented heterogeneous resource awareness under network constraints, and matching of differentiated tasks with multidimensional heterogeneous resources under temporal dependency constraints. Evaluation results show that, compared with representative terrestrial cloud-native cluster operating systems exemplified by Kubernetes, YUHENG-OS achieves a substantially higher task completion ratio, with improvements of up to 98%. This advantage is primarily attributed to its ability to reduce resource awareness delay by 71%.

</details>


### [409] [DELTA: A DAG-aware Efficient OCS Logical Topology Optimization Framework for AIDCs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28096)
*Niangen Ye,Jingya Liu,Weiqiang Sun,Weisheng Hu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: DELTA：基于计算-通信DAG的AI数据中心逻辑拓扑优化框架，通过MILP模型编码时变流量模式，利用非关键任务的时间松弛节省光端口，减少通信时间17.5%，端口消耗降低20%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM规模扩大加剧AI数据中心通信瓶颈，光电路交换机因重配置开销无法在迭代内更新拓扑，现有基于流量矩阵的方法无法捕捉并行化策略决定的突发并发带宽需求

Method: 提出DELTA框架：1) 利用计算-通信DAG编码时变流量模式构建MILP模型；2) 利用非关键任务的时间松弛节省光端口；3) 提出变长时间间隔公式减少解空间；4) 设计双轨加速策略（搜索空间剪枝+启发式热启动）扩展到千GPU集群

Result: 大规模LLM工作负载评估显示：通信时间比最先进的流量矩阵基线减少17.5%；光端口消耗降低至少20%；动态重新分配剩余端口可将带宽瓶颈工作负载与理想非阻塞电网络的性能差距缩小26.1%

Conclusion: DELTA通过考虑并行化策略决定的并发通信需求，有效优化AI数据中心逻辑拓扑，在减少通信时间和端口消耗的同时，使大多数工作负载达到接近理想的性能

Abstract: The rapid scaling of large language models (LLMs) exacerbates communication bottlenecks in AI data centers (AIDCs). To overcome this, optical circuit switches (OCS) are increasingly adopted for their superior bandwidth capacity and energy efficiency. However, their reconfiguration overhead precludes intra-iteration topology update, necessitating a priori engineering of a static topology to absorb time-varying LLM traffic. Existing methods engineer these topologies based on traffic matrices. However, this representation obscures the bursty concurrent bandwidth demands dictated by parallelization strategies and fails to account for the independent channels required for concurrent communication.
  To address this, we propose DELTA, an efficient logical topology optimization framework for AIDCs that leverages the computation-communication directed acyclic graph (DAG) to encode time-varying traffic patterns into a Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) model, while exploiting the temporal slack of non-critical tasks to save optical ports without penalizing iteration makespan. By pioneering a variable-length time interval formulation, DELTA significantly reduces the solution space compared to the fixed-time-step formulation. To scale to thousand-GPU clusters, we design a dual-track acceleration strategy that combines search space pruning (reducing complexity from quadratic to linear) with heuristic hot-starting. Evaluations on large-scale LLM workloads show that DELTA reduces communication time by up to 17.5\% compared to state-of-the-art traffic-matrix-based baselines. Furthermore, the framework reduces optical port consumption by at least 20\%; dynamically reallocating these surplus ports to bandwidth-bottlenecked workloads reduces their performance gap relative to ideal non-blocking electrical networks by up to 26.1\%, ultimately enabling most workloads to achieve near-ideal performance.

</details>


### [410] [Avoid Routing Polarization for OCS-based GPU Clusters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28168)
*Xinchi Han,Weihao Jiang,Yingming Mao,Yike Liu,Zhuoran Liu,Yongxi Lv,Peirui Cao,Zhuotao Liu,Ximeng Liu,Xinbing Wang,Changbo Wu,Zihan Zhu,Wu Dongchao,Yang Jian,Zhang Zhanbang,Yuansen Chen,Shizhen Zhao*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出叶中心范式解决GPU集群中光路交换机引起的路由极化问题，通过均衡流量分布提升ML训练吞吐量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代GPU集群采用三层叶-脊-OCS拓扑，光路交换机仅支持直接连接的脊交换机间电路路径，导致路由极化现象，即不同Pod间带宽需求通过不同脊交换机链路不均等满足，造成流量争用和瓶颈，降低ML训练吞吐量

Method: 引入叶中心范式确保来自同一叶交换机的流量均匀分布在多个脊交换机上，通过理论分析建立避免路由极化的充分条件，提出多项式时间复杂度的逻辑拓扑设计算法

Result: 大规模仿真验证吞吐量提升达19.27%，逻辑拓扑计算开销相比基于混合整数规划的方法减少99.16%

Conclusion: 叶中心范式能有效缓解GPU集群中的路由极化问题，显著提升ML训练吞吐量，同时大幅降低拓扑计算开销

Abstract: Recent years have witnessed the growing deployment of optical circuit switches (OCS) in commercial GPU clusters (e.g., Google A3 GPU cluster) optimized for machine learning (ML) workloads. Such clusters adopt a three-tier leaf-spine-OCS topology, servers attach to leaf-layer electronic packet switches (EPSes); these leaf switches aggregate into spine-layer EPSes to form a Pod; and multiple Pods are interconnected via core-layer OCSes. Unlike EPSes, OCSes only support circuit-based paths between directly connected spine switches, potentially inducing a phenomenon termed routing polarization, which refers to the scenario where the bandwidth requirements between specific pairs of Pods are unevenly fulfilled through links among different spine switches. The resulting imbalance induces traffic contention and bottlenecks on specific leaf-to-spine links, ultimately reducing ML training throughput. To mitigate this issue, we introduce a leaf-centric paradigm to ensure traffic originating from the same leaf switch is evenly distributed across multiple spine switches with balanced loads. Through rigorous theoretical analysis, we establish a sufficient condition for avoiding routing polarization and propose a corresponding logical topology design algorithm with polynomial-time complexity. Large-scale simulations validate up to 19.27% throughput improvement and a 99.16% reduction in logical topology computation overhead compared to Mixed Integer Programming (MIP)-based methods.

</details>


### [411] [From Simulation to Deep Learning: Survey on Network Performance Modeling Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28394)
*Carlos Güemes-Palau,Miquel Ferriol-Galmés,Jordi Paillisse-Vilanova,Pere Barlet-Ros,Albert Cabellos-Aparicio*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文对有线网络性能建模方法进行了全面综述，涵盖传统离散事件模拟、分析方法和新兴机器学习方法，提出了分类体系并讨论了评估挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络性能建模是网络规划、故障排除和配置优化的基础。随着技术发展，出现了从传统离散事件模拟、分析方法到机器学习等多种建模方法，需要对这些方法进行系统梳理和分类，以理解技术演进和研究趋势。

Method: 采用文献综述方法，全面调查几十年来有线网络性能建模方法，包括离散事件模拟、排队论、网络演算等传统方法，以及并行离散事件模拟、机器学习模型和混合方法等新兴方法，并建立分类体系。

Result: 提出了网络性能建模方法的分类体系，总结了各种方法的优缺点和适用场景，分析了技术演进趋势和研究关注点的变化，并讨论了不同建模方法在评估和比较方面的挑战。

Conclusion: 网络性能建模领域经历了从传统模拟分析方法向机器学习混合方法的范式转变，形成了多样化的方法体系。不同方法各有优劣，评估标准不一，比较困难，需要根据具体场景选择合适方法。该综述为理解该领域发展提供了系统框架。

Abstract: Network performance modeling is a field that predates early computer networks and the beginning of the Internet. It aims to predict the traffic performance of packet flows in a given network. Its applications range from network planning and troubleshooting to feeding information to network controllers for configuration optimization. Traditional network performance modeling has relied heavily on Discrete Event Simulation (DES) and analytical methods grounded in mathematical theories such as Queuing Theory and Network Calculus. However, as of late, we have observed a paradigm shift, with attempts to obtain efficient Parallel DES, the surge of Machine Learning models, and their integration with other methodologies in hybrid approaches. This has resulted in a great variety of modeling approaches, each with its strengths and often tailored to specific scenarios or requirements. In this paper, we comprehensively survey the relevant network performance modeling approaches for wired networks over the last decades. With this understanding, we also define a taxonomy of approaches, summarizing our understanding of the state-of-the-art and how both technology and the concerns of the research community evolve over time. Finally, we also consider how these models are evaluated, how their different nature results in different evaluation requirements and goals, and how this may complicate their comparison.

</details>


### [412] [Shy Guys: A Light-Weight Approach to Detecting Robots on Websites](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28546)
*Rémi Van Boxem,Tom Barbette,Cristel Pelsser,Ramin Sadre*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一种轻量级被动式机器人检测方法，结合用户代理字符串分析和favicon启发式规则，仅使用标准Web服务器日志，无需客户端交互，检测率达到67.7%，误报率3%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动化机器人占网络请求约一半，且越来越多机器人故意伪装身份以逃避检测或不遵守robots.txt。现有对策要么资源密集（JavaScript挑战、验证码），要么成本高昂（商业解决方案），要么损害用户体验

Method: 结合用户代理字符串分析和favicon启发式规则的轻量级被动方法，完全基于标准Web服务器日志运行，无需客户端交互。通过分析用户代理字符串特征和favicon请求模式来识别机器人

Result: 在460万请求（包含54,945个唯一用户代理字符串）上评估，检测到67.7%的机器人流量，误报率3%，优于现有技术（检测率低于20%）

Conclusion: 该方法可作为第一道防线，仅将真正模糊的请求路由到主动挑战，保护合法用户体验，提供了一种有效且资源友好的机器人检测方案

Abstract: Automated bots now account for roughly half of all web requests, and an increasing number deliberately spoof their identity to either evade detection or to not respect robots.txt. Existing countermeasures are either resource-intensive (JavaScript challenges, CAPTCHAs), cost-prohibitive (commercial solutions), or degrade the user experience. This paper proposes a lightweight, passive approach to bot detection that combines user-agent string analysis with favicon-based heuristics, operating entirely on standard web server logs with no client-side interaction. We evaluate the method on over 4.6 million requests containing 54,945 unique user-agent strings collected from website hosted all around the earth. Our approach detects 67.7% of bot traffic while maintaining a false-positive rate of 3%, outperforming state of the art (less than 20%). This method can serve as a first line of defence, routing only genuinely ambiguous requests to active challenges and preserving the experience of legitimate users.

</details>


### [413] [Performance Analysis of 5G RAN Slicing Deployment Options in Industry 4.0 Factories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28657)
*Oscar Adamuz-Hinojosa,Abdelhilah Abdeselam,Pablo Muñoz,Pablo Ameigeiras,Juan M. Lopez-Soler*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文比较了5G工业4.0网络中四种RAN切片部署方案，发现资源稀缺时只有按流切片能保证延迟要求，而切片共享方案虽提高资源效率但牺牲了关键流的延迟保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注固定切片结构下的管理架构或资源分配，而本文针对多生产线和异构工业流场景，研究RAN切片部署方案的设计问题，以满足uRLLC的超可靠低延迟通信需求。

Method: 使用基于SNC（随机网络演算）的分析框架和启发式切片规划器，比较四种不同的RAN切片部署选项，这些选项在切片共享和按生产线或按流隔离方面有所不同。

Result: 在资源稀缺情况下，只有按流切片能通过紧密匹配资源与延迟目标来防止延迟违规；切片共享和混合部署虽提高了聚合效率，但以牺牲最延迟关键流的保护为代价。规划器可在非实时时间尺度运行，适合集成到O-RAN非实时RIC循环中。

Conclusion: RAN切片部署策略需要在延迟保证和资源效率之间权衡：按流切片提供最强的延迟保护但资源效率较低，而共享方案提高效率但削弱了对关键流的保护。规划器的时间性能使其适合实际部署。

Abstract: This paper studies Radio Access Network (RAN) slicing strategies for 5G Industry~4.0 networks with ultra-reliable low-latency communication (uRLLC) requirements. We comparatively analyze four RAN slicing deployment options that differ in slice sharing and per-line or per-flow isolation. Unlike prior works that focus on management architectures or resource allocation under a fixed slicing structure, this work addresses the design of RAN slicing deployment options in the presence of multiple production lines and heterogeneous industrial flows. An SNC-based analytical framework and a heuristic slice planner are used to evaluate these options in terms of per-flow delay guarantees and radio resource utilization. Results show that under resource scarcity only per-flow slicing prevents delay violations by tightly matching resources to per-flow delay targets, while slice-sharing and hybrid deployments improve aggregation efficiency at the cost of weaker protection for the most delay-critical flows. Execution-time results confirm that the planner operates at Non-RT time scales, enabling its integration within O-RAN Non-RT RIC loops.

</details>


### [414] [How Many Qubits Can Be Teleported? Scalability of Fidelity-Constrained Quantum Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28672)
*Oscar Adamuz-Hinojosa,Jonathan Prados-Garzon,Sara Vaquero-Gil,Juan M. Lopez-Soler*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 该论文研究量子网络中多量子比特在保真度约束下的可传送数量，定义了量子应用级可靠性指标，并开发了蒙特卡洛模拟器分析不同量子链路和存储器下的性能瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子网络通过量子隐形传态传输量子比特，但量子存储器中的退相干会逐渐降低量子态保真度。某些量子应用需要同时传送多个量子比特，且要求所有量子比特的保真度都高于特定阈值。需要研究在这种保真度约束下，两节点量子网络中最多能传送多少量子比特。

Method: 定义了量子应用级可靠性指标（所有端到端贝尔对在完成多量子比特传送阶段时都满足目标保真度的概率）。设计了基于蒙特卡洛的模拟器，捕捉随机贝尔对生成、量子中继器辅助的纠缠分布以及保真度退化过程。考虑了光纤和地面自由空间光学量子链路，以及代表性的NV中心和囚禁离子量子存储器。

Result: 结果表明，在严格的保真度目标下，存储器相干时间是主要的可扩展性瓶颈。同时，并行纠缠生成对于多量子比特传送至关重要。

Conclusion: 量子网络中多量子比特传送的性能受存储器相干时间限制，并行纠缠生成是提高传送能力的关键因素。研究结果为量子网络设计和量子应用开发提供了重要指导。

Abstract: Quantum networks (QNs) enable the transfer of qubits between distant nodes using quantum teleportation, which reproduces a qubit state at a remote location by consuming a shared Bell pair. After teleportation, qubits are stored in quantum memories, where decoherence progressively degrades their quantum states. This degradation is quantified by the fidelity, defined as the overlap between the stored quantum state and the ideal target state. Some quantum applications (QApps) require the teleportation of multiple qubits and can only operate if all teleported qubits simultaneously maintain a fidelity above a given threshold. In this paper, we study how many qubits can be teleported under such fidelity-constrained operation in a two-node QN. To that end, we define a QApp-level reliability metric as the probability that all end-to-end Bell pairs satisfy the target fidelity upon completion of the multi-qubit teleportation stage. We design a Monte Carlo-based simulator that captures stochastic Bell-pair generation, Quantum Repeater (QR)-assisted entanglement distribution, and fidelity degradation. Fiber-based and terrestrial free-space optical (FSO) quantum links and representative NV-center- and trapped-ion-based quantum memories are considered. Results show that memory coherence is the main scalability bottleneck under stringent fidelity targets, while parallel entanglement generation is essential for multi-qubit teleportation.

</details>


### [415] [A Techno-Economic Framework for Cost Modeling and Revenue Opportunities in Open and Programmable AI-RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28680)
*Gabriele Gemmi,Michele Polese,Tommaso Melodia*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: AI-RAN架构通过将GPU加速的无线接入网络空闲算力出租给AI工作负载，可提升资本效率，技术经济分析显示投资回报率最高可达8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 5G网络大规模部署未能为移动网络运营商带来预期投资回报，引发对6G经济可行性的担忧。同时，AI推理和训练工作负载需求激增导致全球算力紧张。AI-RAN架构有望通过共享空闲算力提高资本效率，但其经济性尚未得到验证。

Method: 结合公开的5G Layer-1处理基准测试（从x86服务器到现代GPU的异构平台）、现实流量模型和LLM推理的AI服务需求概况，构建联合成本与收入模型，量化GPU-RAN部署中的空闲算力并评估出租给AI租户的回报。

Result: 在各种场景下（包括token贬值、需求动态变化和不同GPU服务密度），GPU-heavy部署的额外资本和运营支出可通过AI-on-RAN收入抵消，投资回报率最高可达8倍。

Conclusion: 研究结果强化了基于加速器的RAN架构和未来6G部署的长期经济性，表明AI-RAN架构能够显著改善移动网络运营商的投资回报。

Abstract: The large-scale deployment of 5G networks has not delivered the expected return on investment for mobile network operators, raising concerns about the economic viability of future 6G rollouts. At the same time, surging demand for Artificial Intelligence (AI) inference and training workloads is straining global compute capacity. AI-RAN architectures, in which Radio Access Network (RAN) platforms accelerated on Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) share idle capacity with AI workloads during off-peak periods, offer a potential path to improved capital efficiency. However, the economic case for such systems remains unsubstantiated. In this paper, we present a techno-economic analysis of AI-RAN deployments by combining publicly available benchmarks of 5G Layer-1 processing on heterogeneous platforms -- from x86 servers with accelerators for channel coding to modern GPUs -- with realistic traffic models and AI service demand profiles for Large Language Model (LLM) inference. We construct a joint cost and revenue model that quantifies the surplus compute capacity available in GPU-based RAN deployments and evaluates the returns from leasing it to AI tenants.
